programme.desc: Sue begins her journey in the highest mountains on earth. She treks to the source of the Ganges river and pokes her nose into the lives of hermits and the wise and wandering holy people that call this sacred landscape home.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins: The Gangetic Plain
programme.desc: Sue is halfway down the Ganges in the ancient city of Varanasi, a place which, for India's 950 million Hindus, has a unique significance. Sue immerses herself into the complex life of Varanasi.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins: The Delta
programme.desc: Sue's first stop is the ancient city of Patna, capital of Bihar state, along the banks of the Ganges. Now that the imperial drug lords have left, Patna produces something far more intoxicating - education.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
programme.desc: Harry is selected as Hogwarts' representative in the Tri-Wizard Tournament. But between the stresses of school and the aching of his mysterious scar, he doesn't realize the forces of evil are plotting and he's a part of it.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
programme.desc: Before his fifth year begins, Harry and his cousin are attacked by Dementors, forcing Harry to use magic outside of Hogwarts and therefore face the possibility of a trial and being expelled from the school. The Order of the Phoenix is founded.

programme.title: WWE NXT
programme.desc: A unique acrobatic and theatrically aggressive presentation of wrestling that features the newest WWE stars.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
programme.desc: Harry Potter and Dumbledore embark on a dangerous journey to defeat Harry's evil enemy, Voldemort. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang probe into the identity of the mysterious Half-Blood Prince.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Young St. Nic

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hearts and Crafts

programme.desc: Todd takes on too much as the family heads to Florida to run their first Miss Florida USA pageant. Faye makes a rash purchase and is called out on it by Todd.

programme.desc: NCIS Special Agent Tony DiNozzo assists the New Orleans team when a Navy lieutenant on leave dies of the bubonic plague. The team races to locate all additional sailors on liberty, control a potential outbreak and determine the source of the disease.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: It Happened Last Night

programme.desc: Sheneneh appears as a contestant on a dating game show and gets a lot more than a date.

programme.title: Martin: The Tooth Will Set You Free

programme.title: Martin: DMV Blues
programme.desc: Martin's plans for his day off are stalled by a stop at the DMV with Tommy.

programme.title: Martin: Why Can't We Be Friends (Part 1)
programme.desc: Tommy and Martin get into an argument over a suitcase that spirals out of control.

programme.desc: After Tommy's car accident, Martin and the gang race to the hospital to see him.

programme.desc: A man breaks out of prison to avenge his brother's death and gets caught in a war.

programme.title: Movie: Boyz 'N the Hood

programme.title: Movie: Hallmark Hall of Fame: A Christmas Love Story
programme.desc: A youth-choir director is tasked with writing the title song for her Christmas Eve show but becomes distracted when a gifted boy joins the choir. Unbeknownst to her, this boy does not tell his widowed father of his plans to sing in the service.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Dollywood
programme.desc: When a NYC event planner returns to Tennessee to plan the Christmas celebration at Dollywood, she's paired with the head of operations who thinks he can handle the party just fine on his own.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: A historian is hired to create a Christmas display at the Plaza. While working, she learns that fate has prevailed and teamed her up with a handsome decorator to help bring the display, and their romance, to life.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart: Home for Christmas
programme.desc: As residents of Hope Valley celebrate the Christmas spirit, intertwined stories explore the emotions and magic that connects them during the holiday season.

programme.title: Movie: Cherished Memories: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: A couple celebrate their second Christmas together, but, an unexpected guest, and a fight to save their town's community centre, ensures they have a Christmas they have never forget.

programme.title: Movie: Check Inn to Christmas
programme.desc: A town's Christmas celebration is used to reunite two families to save an inn.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Duet
programme.desc: Famous for their beloved Christmas duet, fate brings ex-music duo together over the holidays, just in time for the annual Yuletide Festival.

programme.title: Movie: On the Twelfth Day of Christmas
programme.desc: Maggie is thrilled when her long time crush, Mitch, moves to her little town. Once she discovers his love for Christmas has changed she vows to bring his holiday spirit back.

programme.title: Movie: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is hired to become a personal shopper for an uptight, corporate executive. As they work together, she teaches him that Christmas has less to do with the money that is spent, and more to do with the people in your life.

programme.title: Movie: Best Christmas Party Ever
programme.desc: An up-and-coming event planner finds out that her boss intends to hand the business to her nephew. Tensions run high when she is forced to train and plan for the biggest holiday party of the season.

programme.title: Movie: Coming Home for Christmas
programme.desc: While planning a final Christmas gala at the exquisite Ashford Estate, a house manager falls for the handsome executor of the estate.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle Around the Clock
programme.desc: A woman plans a Christmas to remember with her college friends, only to be thwarted by an opportunity she can't pass up. Much to her surprise, she is forced to team up with a man who has a completely different view of what Christmas really means.

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Holly Lodge
programme.desc: A woman inherits the Evergreen Inn and Ski Lodge from her parents and starts a new tradition of spending every holiday there. While visiting she meets a family that will change her life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tower Top Hand
programme.desc: Mike help erect a radio tower in North Dakota. Mike is commemorated in Hollywood for doing a dirty job in each of the 50 states.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Medical Waste
programme.desc: Mike travels to Sioux Falls and South Dakota to spend the day working as a medical waste processor.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Water Softener Technician
programme.desc: Mike travels to Moorhead, Minnesota, to work as a water softener technician. Then he heads to the Westin St. Francis hotel in San Francisco where he takes on the job of a coin washer.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mardi Gras Bladder Banger
programme.desc: Mike travels to Mobile, Alabama to get a behind-the-scenes look at a Mardi Gras folly float. He spends his day assembling cow bladders that will be used during the parade to drive away evil spirits.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Fossil Hunter
programme.desc: Mike travels to a remote area near Moab, Utah, to take on the job of being a paleontologist.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Barber's Assistant/ Landfill Operator
programme.desc: In Mobile, Alabama, Mike studies old school tricks to cutting hair with a local barber. Mike then stops by the Ostrom Road Landfill in California.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mule Logger
programme.desc: Mike teams up with a master-cooper, also known as a barrel maker, and attempts to master the art of toasting the inside of barrels over an open flame. It is the toasting that gives the wine a special flavor while it ferments.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Penguin Keeper
programme.desc: Mike Rowe joins a rowdy construction crew in California and learns the art of concrete stamping. Mike later takes care of some penguins and digs for bloodworms.

programme.title: Serengeti: Destiny
programme.desc: With food in abundance it's the time of plenty in the Serengeti, but a series of unexpected events turns families against each other and stretches relationships to breaking point.

programme.title: Serengeti: Conflict
programme.desc: As the Serengeti starts to dry out, competition heats up between the families we met in Episode One. The strong females take center stage, dealing with headstrong males and fighting for the survival of their kin.

programme.title: Serengeti: Invasion
programme.desc: The anticipation of the annual Great Migration is being felt by all of the Serengeti's families as they wait with great desperation for it to arrive. The land continues to get hotter and hunger starts to bite as food becomes even more scarce.

programme.title: Serengeti: Misfortune
programme.desc: The long-awaited arrival of the Great Migration brings opportunities and food in abundance, but it also increases conflict as every one of the Serengeti's families is put to the test.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Worst Day Ever: Rear Ended
programme.desc: Two separate car crash victims are brought to the ER in their underwear. A woman is acting delusional and refuses to allow the ER staff to touch her.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Celebration Stoppers

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery: John the Baptist

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery: Shroud of Turin

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery: Mary Magdalene

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery: The Tomb of Herod
programme.desc: This episode explores the tomb of King Herod, which was a huge news story when it was unearthed by Israeli archaeologist Ehud Netzer in 2007.

programme.title: Finding Jesus: Faith, Fact, Forgery: Doubting Thomas

programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Old Flame
programme.desc: Eddie runs into his cradle-robbing first love and must decide whether to rekindle his romance with the sexy senior citizen. Then, Granny and Lucy compete to win the affections of an androgynous dispatcher and Terry discovers moisturizer.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Where's the Beefcake
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tries to take nudity out of the annual Firefighters' Beefcake Calendar and the crew must get creative to maintain the integrity of its sexy (and oily) tradition.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.desc: Khloé is hurt by an interview which contains negative comments about her and her family. Kris gets Jonathan to sneak away from Kim for a trip to Sonoma. Scott takes up karate to satisfy his couples therapy homework.

programme.desc: Khloé doesn’t feel comfortable in her house so Rob invites her to move in with him. Kris gets bitten by the Broadway bug and starts taking singing and dancing lessons and Kourtney sneaks to Las Vegas to catch Scott in a lie.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 1
programme.desc: The family hears about a surprise Kanye is planning for Kim's birthday. Kris goes into panic mode when she learns Kim's house is delayed and Kourtney and Khloé plot revenge on judgmental Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 2
programme.desc: The family gathers in San Francisco to surprise Kim on her birthday but the real surprise is Kanye proposing to Kim. Meanwhile, Scott heads to New York to spend time with his father and sick mother.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Two Birthdays and a Yard Sale
programme.desc: Kourtney attempts to organize a family yard sale. Kendall prepares for her 18th birthday and makes plans to move out of the house, while Bruce tries to pretend his upcoming birthday is no big deal.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: We're reviewing the year's biggest feuds, craziest reality TV moments, top fashion moments and more.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashians on Vacation
programme.desc: Travel around the world with Kim and the gang, as the defining moments from each of the Kardashian family vacations are recapped.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cheesiest
programme.desc: Four cheese experts create their signature dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Carnival Games
programme.desc: The market has been turned into a midway so that four carnival food chefs can compete for a jackpot worth up to $20,000. First, they try their luck spinning a wheel of chance for the ingredients in their fried classic. Next, chefs play Guy Fieri's arcade.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Caught in the Middle
programme.desc: Chefs must make an international dish using only ingredients from the middle aisles of the grocery store.

programme.title: Food Network Challenge: A Christmas Story Cakes
programme.desc: Before anyone got Chopped, Threw Down with Bobby, or piped icing to victory in Cupcake Wars, there was Food Network Challenge.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Don't Skimp on the Shrimp
programme.desc: Four chefs must make their signature dishes using an insignificant four-and-a-half pounds of ingredients. Next, the chefs must butter up the judges with a fantastic weeknight family dinner featuring jumbo butterfly shrimp.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Guys
programme.desc: Four chefs from four of Guy Fieri's own restaurants face off in two rounds of culinary combat. Guy kicks things off by challenging his guys to make their best burger without any key ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Restaurant Teams
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows that there's nothing like the teamwork in a busy restaurant's kitchen, so he invites three teams of phenomenal chefs to represent their restaurants in Flavortown.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: First Round Redemption
programme.desc: Four GGG competitors who previously checked out early return to Flavortown to try their luck again. In each round, Guy Fieri hits them with his Wheel of Redemption, which features the games that the chefs went out on.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Christmas Goodies
programme.desc: It's just a few days before Christmas, and Ree Drummond is making a slew of Christmas goodies as gifts. They come in all flavors, shapes and sizes, including homemade gumdrops, cayenne cheese straws, and cornflake Christmas wreaths.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: Trolls Cake
programme.desc: A cake artist encounters some hair-raising challenges while taking a Troll from the big screen to a cake.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: Star-Studded Cast Gets Caked
programme.desc: Cakes include a mythical creation for a 40th birthday party, a music-playing tribute to the 1950's and a cake for the cast and crew of 'Modern Family' to celebrate their 200th episode.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A non-traditional bride and groom take the vow 'till death do us part' literally when they order a skeleton cake for their wedding. A young man's bar mitzvah cake is a home run, and one bakery makes some moves when they put hydraulics on a car cake.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: This Cake Rocks!
programme.desc: Three cake artists create dream cakes that defy expectations including a giant planet Earth that weighs more than a motorcycle, a Bollywood-themed chandelier that lights up and a confectionary celebration of a beloved children's series.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: Fairy Cakes Can Come True
programme.desc: Cakes include an island-themed cake for a Polynesian dance troupe, a fantasy fairy cake and a high-fashion cake for a stylish birthday party.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: Pretty Ponies
programme.desc: My Little Pony comes to life in cake for one lucky girl's horse-themed birthday party. A cake proves to be a real bear for a Portland cake artist, and things could get messy when another cake artist uses only buttercream to decorate a cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four Under 40
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's dishing up four incredibly easy meals in less than 40 minutes. First up is her Chicken with Pesto Cream, the perfect food fix for a quick working dinner. Next, Cajun Veggie Pasta is brilliant for kids when you are in a time crunch.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: A Tale of Four Lunches
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's whipping up four legendary lunches, from crowd pleasers to solo pleasures. There's spicy chuck burgers piled high with onion rings, plus a mother-daughter lunchtime collaboration of sesame tofu salad.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Peyton's Places: Volume 1
programme.desc: Peyton Manning visits places associated with the NFL. Taking a spin in the Hupmobile with Jay Leno, throwing a pass to Cris Carter off the Radiator Building in NYC, using Stickum with Fred Biletnikoff and confronting Ray Lewis.

programme.title: Peyton's Places: Volume 2
programme.desc: Peyton meets the super fans from SNL. Brett Favre and Peyton walk through some of the key stories from his consecutive starts streak and Eli and Peyton go to the house that the Lombardi Trophy was first conceived.

programme.title: Peyton's Places: Volume 3
programme.desc: Deion Sanders teaches Peyton how to play defensive back. Peyton is in Green Bay to get the story behind Brett Favre's first touchdown pass in the Super Bowl. Plus, Eli tells Peyton how he saw the final Giants drive when they won Super Bowl XLII.

programme.title: Peyton's Places: Volume 4
programme.desc: Legendary quarterback Peyton Manning hosts and revisits seminal moments in NFL history.

programme.title: Dateline Extra: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina. We take a look at who would want her dead and why.

programme.title: Dateline: The Trap
programme.desc: A housewife in an exclusive neighborhood in Long Beach, California is murdered in broad daylight while cops surround her home. The suspected killer claims it was a burglary gone wrong, but detectives discover something more sinister.

programme.title: Dateline Extra: Deadly Twist
programme.desc: The murder of a beautiful California mom beloved by four men reopens a puzzling mystery surrounding the untimely death of another young woman decades earlier on a desolate mountain trail in Georgia.

programme.title: Dateline Extra: Mystery on Lockhart Road
programme.desc: Former Indiana State Trooper, David Camm, came home to find his wife and children murdered. He would spend the next 13 years fighting to clear his name.

programme.title: Dateline: Family Business
programme.desc: Two close-knit Californian families are torn apart by money and greed. Keith Morrison reports on a story that involves unexpected turns, fascinating detective work and a secret letter.

programme.title: Dateline: The Women and Dirty John
programme.desc: Conman John Meehan made national headlines after his crimes and their deadly final culmination were featured on the popular podcast 'Dirty John'. Keith Morrison sits down with Meehan's wife Debra Newell.

programme.title: Dateline Extra: The Sting
programme.desc: Newlywed Dalia Dippolito returned home from the gym to the awful news that her husband had been killed. In a case where almost nothing was as it seemed, investigators wanted to know: Was Dalia diabolical or an unwitting pawn in a hoax gone wrong?

programme.title: Dateline: Good and Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at an Anaheim trash facility, a dedicated detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know that search will bring her face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline Extra: Out There in the Dark
programme.desc: Dennis Murphy reports on the death of a young mother in Ohio and the investigation spanning years and multiple states.

programme.desc: Stan takes an experimental drug that instantly turns him into a 'woman.'

programme.desc: When Carrie receives her Christmas bonus, Doug wants to invest it in his IPS pension fund.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Better Camera

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ovary Action
programme.desc: As Doug and Carrie attempt to conceive a child, Doug's parents arrive for Christmas.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mentalo Case
programme.desc: The stage is set for a Christmas fiasco when Doug tries to find his favourite boyhood toy.

programme.desc: Doug finds it difficult working with Carrie when she takes a temporary job at his company.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Awed Couple
programme.desc: When Deacon and Kelly find new friends, Doug and Carrie must turn to their old friends.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Baker's Doesn't
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie run into Father McDaniel at the movies they feel guilty that they haven't been to church in some time and sign up to help out during the busy holiday season. Meanwhile, Arthur and Spence try to write a Christmas carol.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Thought That Counts
programme.desc: Debra wonders why Raymond doesn't put as much thought into her gifts as he does for Marie.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Jazz Records
programme.desc: Ray tries to make amends when Frank reminds him of the day he ruined his jazz records.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Mini Murry
programme.desc: After Barry pleads for money to purchase a very expensive item, Beverly says he must earn the money himself, so Murray suggests he go to work at the Ottoman Empire furniture store with him. Meanwhile, Adam and Pops attend an R-rated movie.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Kara-te

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Change of Heart/ Pants
programme.desc: Christine and Richard help Marly and Lindsay through labour, evoking memories of Ritchie's birth and renewing romantic feelings.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: Miracle Cub

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: Training Dragons

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has staff preparing for the big day. Zoo director Jim Breheny helps a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle. And, a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age so staff make sure he gets all he needs. A trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their big debut. A new exhibit is constructed for a big amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Zoo: From the Inside: Caution, Cobra
programme.desc: Golden Girls namesake Blanche, the feisty alpaca is due to give birth at any time. A team of vets must keep their wits about them when treating a venomous king cobra, and Bouba the Andean bear reunites with his loyal mate Nicole.

programme.title: The Zoo: From the Inside: Saving Max
programme.desc: Max the camel is treated for a large abscess growing on his head, and it's a fun day for the kids when a marmot visits their classroom. Meanwhile, a peregrine falcon found near a skyscraper is taken to the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: From the Inside: Otterly Unusual
programme.desc: An aging otter named Jasmine worries the staff when she becomes lethargic. New York Aquarium staff begins the daunting task of moving every shark to a new exhibit, and a capercaillie couple needs help to ensure healthy offspring.

programme.title: The Zoo: Meet the Babies
programme.desc: A look back at the cutest baby moments from the show. A tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby. A Thomson's gazelle needs a helping hand from zoo staff. A newborn snow leopard struggles to walk. A little blue penguin becomes a star.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott
programme.desc: Max, a beloved camel, develops a large abscess on the top of his head. An adorable marmot prepares for her first classroom visit as an ambassador animal. Later, a peregrine falcon found at the base of skyscraper is bought to the zoo for a health check.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: It's a Baby Giraffe!
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck in the Australia Zoo's Mammal Department as Rosie the Giraffe is ready to give birth. Robert has a bloody encounter with a wild python that's entered an enclosure, and Terri helps the keepers wrangle Chief the Tasmanian Devil.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Baby Kangaroo
programme.desc: While Bindi and the keepers ready Sophie the baby giraffe for her first steps into her enclosure, Robert helps to hand-raise another baby: Melman the kangaroo. Terri oversees a health check for one of the zoo's favourite characters, Ravi the red panda.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Swimming With Steve
programme.desc: Bindi swims alongside whale sharks, assisting with research efforts on the world's latest and least understood fish. Robert work to save an echidna that's tightly trapped under a fridge. Terri joins a closeup exam on a grizzly.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Race to Save the Platypus
programme.desc: Terri welcomes Mballa, a new cheetah cub from South Africa, to the Australia zoo family. Meanwhile, Robert sets out to save a stranded platypus and Bindi prepares to meet Bert the koala Joey as he emerges from his mother's pouch for the first time.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Alligator Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Robert feeds 44 hungry alligators, all at the same time. Terri helps examine Kaitlynn the tiger and makes a thrilling discovery, while Bindi follows the heartbreaking story of her old friends, Zambezi the Zebra.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Turtles Take Flight
programme.desc: Robert and Terri take to the skies to release three rescued sea turtles near the Great Barrier Reef. Bindi anxiously awaits the birth of the zoo's first tiger cub in years. Richie helps a baby wallaby in his struggle for survival.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Raised in Rescue
programme.desc: Return adopters visit Villalobos to find a dog that will feel at home on their boat. Tania and Mariah head out to rescue a stray that is hiding beneath a shipping container. And parolee Jammall starts to slip up, risking his future at the rescue.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Here in Their Golden Years

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Home Is Where the Dog Is
programme.desc: One of Earl's favourite senior dogs finally has a chance at a forever home. Tia heads to a small shelter in rural Louisiana to help with a hound that they took in. Tania, Mariah and Lizzy take on a project that showcases dogs in their forever homes.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Treasure Not Trash

programme.desc: The ladies drive to Key West in two divided groups. As they prepare to go to a drag show, Gina and Emily worry about something Vicki has done in regards to Kelly. Gina and Emily try to convince Vicki to come clean with Kelly about what she's done.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Some Fences Are Made to Be Broken
programme.desc: Wrapping up their trip to Florida, Vicki returns from the hospital with a sprained ankle. Tamra and Shannon go parasailing, while Gina faces her fears of murky water. On a sunset cruise, Kelly attempts to make amends with some of the women.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Whooping It Up for Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Shannon goes on a date with a man who she plans to invite to Vicki's engagement party. Emily is surprised by a medical diagnosis. The ladies celebrate Vicki's engagement with a 'farmhouse chic' party, but Tamra melts down after seeing Kelly.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Reunion, Part One

programme.title: Golf
programme.desc: Golf.

programme.title: Feherty: Tom Watson
programme.desc: Feherty visits golf legend Tom Watson at his ranch in Kansas City. Tom reflects on his early years as a player, his Major Championships and his long friendship with David.

programme.title: Feherty: Brooks Koepka
programme.desc: Feherty sits poolside in south Florida with 2018 U.S. Open and PGA champion Brooks Koepka. Discussions include a no-nonsense look at his unconventional road to elite status, his three career defining major wins and his outspoken approach to stardom.

programme.title: Feherty: Stephen Curry
programme.desc: Feherty and Stephen Curry discuss whether or not Curry could earn a spot on the PGA Tour. Curry reveals that, in addition to being a great shooter, he's an intense and engaging athlete.

programme.title: Feherty: Tommy Fleetwood
programme.desc: Tommy Fleetwood discusses his emergence as an elite golfer and stories from his career. Plus, learn about his experience at the Open from sneaking in as a seven year old to shooting a record tying 63 as a pro.

programme.title: Feherty: Paul Casey
programme.desc: Feherty hits the desert for a revealing chat with double-digit European Tour champion and 2006 Player of the Year Paul Casey about PC rules, career commitment, graceful aging, overcoming adversity, and Ryder Cup outrage.

programme.title: Feherty: John McEnroe
programme.desc: Feherty travels to Malibu, California, for a disarmingly candid conversation with tennis' favorite bad-boy, John McEnroe. The pair discuss tempers, John's transition into broadcasting, and the loud habits he learned from his Irish-American parents.

programme.title: Feherty: Charles Barkley
programme.desc: Never-before seen footage of Feherty's interview with Charles Barkley in 2011.

programme.title: Feherty: Bernhard Langer
programme.desc: David sits down with his former Ryder Cup teammate Bernhard Langer. The long time friends talk about Langer's two Masters victories, continued excellence on the PGA Tour Champions, and reminisce about playing together on the European Tour.

programme.title: Feherty: Doc Rivers
programme.desc: Feherty travels to Los Angeles for an eye opening conversation with Doc Rivers, the coach of the Los Angeles Clippers. They discuss golf, trash talking and how the events of his life prepared him to cope with a bizarre racial scandal.

programme.title: Feherty: Michael Strahan
programme.desc: David Feherty sits down with Michael Strahan for a fast and fun conversation covering Michael's Hall of Fame career in the NFL and his subsequent emergence as a morning television star. Strahan discusses the Super Bowl, growing up in Germany and more.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 1: Back to Basics
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal take you back to basics to achieve an ideal impact position with your feet, hands, hips and shoulders. Martin will reveal how a Samurai sword came in handy for Jack Nicklaus throughout his career and how it can help you.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 6: Arnold Palmer
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O’Neal will honour Arnold Palmer and his lasting legacy on golf instruction. Learn the two anchors to Palmer’s powerful swing and drills to add a little Arnie to your own game. Plus, look back at Arnold's appearance in 2012.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 9: Drive, Chip and Putt
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O’Neal will share tips from past Masters champions to help you drive, chip, and putt. Learn how to crush the driver like Jack Nicklaus, chip it close like Phil Mickelson, and sink pressure putts like Sandy Lyle.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 11: Teamwork
programme.desc: Martin Hall teams up with Blair O’Neal to teach great drills that require a partner. Learn a drill that Tiger Woods and Mark O’Meara did together in the fairway bunker that helped both become major champions.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 12: Path to Success
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to become a better ball striker by improving your swing path. Martin shares drills he learned working alongside Rory McIlroy.

programme.title: Me & My Golf: Driver
programme.desc: Andy and Piers want to get the most out of the driver. They demonstrate what the pros look like at impact and share what to do to get into that position. They'll also show a drill to cure the slice and explain how to maximize distance with a bigger turn.

programme.title: PGA Tour Special: Must-See Moments of the Decade
programme.desc: Look back on many of the incredible shots and storylines that shaped the decade on the PGA Tour with extended analysis into a handful of unforgettable moments of the past 10 years.

programme.title: Golf Films: Hogan: Perseverance
programme.desc: Part one of this this two-part biopic reflects on the humble beginnings of Ben Hogan and the impact of the near-fatal car crash during the prime of his career.

programme.title: Golf Films: Hogan: Perfection
programme.desc: Part two of this two-part biopic chronicles one of the greatest comebacks of all time. After a near-fatal car crash, Ben Hogan pressed on to become a 64-time PGA Tour winner and the inspiration for the 1951 motion picture 'Follow the Sun.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Big Guns
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with the most explosive item to ever walk through the door--a pair of Soviet nuclear missile launch keys.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 1934 Rickenbacher 'frying pan' guitar and a document signed by John Hancock turn up at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: On Guard
programme.desc: The gang checks out a uniform from the King of England's royal guard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Say It, Don't Spray It
programme.desc: A Gibson Super Jumbo guitar once owned by Peggy Eames comes into the shop. Then, Corey and the Old Man check out a Buck Rogers tin rocket.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: No Shoes, No Shirt, No Service
programme.desc: Famed guitarist Vic Flick brings in a 1961 Fender Stratocaster used on the 007 theme song. Then, Corey and Chumlee check out a fully customized 2006 Dodge Magnum, and Chumlee designs a new uniform shirt for shop employees.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chords, Swords and Rewards
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a sword belonging to the Freemasons. Will the guys be able to sneak in an offer or will negotiations get chopped? Then, Corey and Chumlee play with the idea of scoring a Gibson Master Museum guitar.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Field Trip
programme.desc: The Old Man and Chumlee discover signed photos of Enola Gay; Semi Moseley's personal guitar jams into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bucking Bronco
programme.desc: Rick considers a signed copy of a Red Hot Chili Peppers album and Corey has a look at a Mobo Bronco toy. Later, Chum decides to bend the rules after getting in trouble for wearing a hat to work.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Riders On the Pawn
programme.desc: Two flintlock blunderbuss pistols and a David Hasselhoff signed rescue buoy from 'Baywatch'.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Party on, Pawn
programme.desc: A bat designed by Ty Cobb and autographed by Joe Sewell is brought into the shop. Also, Rick checks out the queen of movie mobiles, the 'Wayne's World' car.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gotham Pawn
programme.desc: Limited edition Batman and Joker Bolin Guitars; a bronze sculpture by M.L. Snowden; a pair of signed Betty Crocker letters; a WWII era Adolf Hitler pincushion.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Dollars and Dunks
programme.desc: Rick checks out one of Kobe Bryant's warm-up jerseys that's been signed by the man himself. An antique weapon sale finds Rick debating the item's price. Corey makes an impulsive buy of a favourite novel.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Poképawn
programme.desc: A valuable and rare Pokémon collection finds its way to the shop and a battle ensues to determine if it's worth a buy. Also, a 1926 Dunhill Watch Lighter looks for a home in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pistol Is Mightier Than the Sword
programme.desc: Rick checks out a sword-pistol combo from the 1700s. A portrait of John Barrymore, the famous film and theatre actor, may be worth a buy. Rick learns about an antique navigational timepiece from the 19th century. Corey's excited about a 1969 Harley.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Game of Pawns
programme.desc: Winter is coming when Rick sees an autographed Game of Thrones item. Then, Chumlee stirs up commotion with an Amazonian blowgun, and picker Spencer Victory stops by with an ancient Middle Eastern sword. Later, Rick checks out a 1900s DNC collectible.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: May the Pawn Be With You

programme.desc: A pair of co-workers don't realize that they are each other's lonely heart pen-pals.

programme.desc: In order to teach the kids that Christmas isn't all about receiving presents, Mom hides their gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Christmas
programme.desc: Cricket becomes worried that he's not on Santa's 'Nice List' so he goes on a spree of good deeds. Gramma and Nancy go on a last minute search for Bill's gift.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: How the Syd Stole Christmas
programme.desc: After steering clear of the holidays due to her mother's passing, Syd finds a new fondness for Christmas.

programme.title: K.C. Undercover: Twas the Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: When K.C. gives her dad the perfect Christmas gift, she is the one who is surprised when she learns Craig and her Poppa Earl don't really get along and he has no idea they are all spies.

programme.title: K.C. Undercover: Holly Holly Not So Jolly
programme.desc: As the Cooper family decorates the house for the holidays, K.C. begins to reflect on the many disguises and missions she has taken on as a spy in hopes she can get over her holiday blues and recapture the spirit of the season.

programme.title: Austin & Jessie & Ally: All Star New Year
programme.desc: Austin, Ally, Trish and Dez travel to Times Square where Austin is booked to perform on New Year's Eve. When they can't get through New York City's crowded streets, Jessie comes up with a plan to get them on stage and have Austin record one of her songs.

programme.title: Jessie: But Africa Is So ... Fari
programme.desc: After misinterpreting that Jessie has gone to Africa to reunite with Brooks, the kids hop a private flight to Africa to stop her. Turns out, Jessie wasn't there, but now must go with Bertram to retrieve the kids.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Falcon-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Joey's popularity at school is threatened when an old nemesis from Wisconsin returns and Maddie feels the need to keep a close eye on Parker's new friend.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Ex-a-Rooney
programme.desc: When Maddie and Josh start hanging out again, Joey feels awkward by their rekindled friendship. Meanwhile, Parker and Val find themselves in a jam when competing for a coveted finalist spot in the Mars Madness competition.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Toilets and Tiaras
programme.desc: Zuri hosts a beauty pageant at Camp Kikiwaka.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Bungle in the Jungle
programme.desc: Lou has decided to go to college next year, but her mom wants her to take over the family farm.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Gruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: The kids explore the booths at Camp Kikiwaka’s Olde Moose Rump Days. They find an old wooden box from Zuri’s booth and suddenly find themselves in the 1600s.

programme.title: Jessie: A Doll's Outhouse
programme.desc: After the girls watch a scary movie, Jessie tries to help Zuri conquer her fear of dolls by confessing her own fear of porta-potties. Cameron teaches Ravi how to impress a girl, and Bertram listens to opera non-stop to win a radio contest.

programme.title: Jessie: Beauty and the Beasts
programme.desc: At a pageant, Jesse runs into her nemesis Nanny Agatha. Luke and Ravi play practical jokes on Bertram.

programme.title: Jessie: Creepy Connie's Curtain Call
programme.desc: Jessie writes a play to be produced at the kids' school, but to Luke's shock, she's cast Creepy Connie as his love interest. Meanwhile, Zuri job-shadows Bertram for her school report.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Christmas
programme.desc: Cricket becomes worried that he's not on Santa's 'Nice List' so he goes on a spree of good deeds. Gramma and Nancy go on a last minute search for Bill's gift.

programme.title: Spookley the Square Pumpkin and the Christmas Kittens
programme.desc: Spookley the Square Pumpkin comes across three stray kittens while trying to find a home during a winter storm.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: PJ Masks Music Videos: Heroes Forever
Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Croissant de Triomphe
Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have Dance Face?
programme.desc: Cami and Delaware try out for the dance team, but when Cami discovers Delaware makes a goofy face when she's dancing, Cami worries that they won't make the team.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Just Dance?
programme.desc: When Cami learns that the reason she didn't make the dance team is because she spends too much of her time doing Would You Wrather, she is determined to prove she can do both.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Help a Wrather?
programme.desc: Cooper struggles to complete 'would you wrather' challenges without Cami, now that she has quit to focus on dance full time.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Dreams Come True
programme.desc: As the end of camp nears, Griff gets some unexpected news that changes his life.

programme.title: Bunk'd: We Didn't Start the Fire
programme.desc: To celebrate their last night at camp, the kids go on an overnight camping trip. Ravi and Emma take their final tests to become counselors.

programme.title: Bunk'd: We Can't Bear It!
programme.desc: The Ross kids return to Camp Kikiwaka only to discover the cabins were never rebuilt and Gladys has disappeared.

programme.title: Jessie: Between the Swoon and New York City
programme.desc: Jessie hits it off with a new guy she meets in the park unaware that he is Ms. Chesterfield's son.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Snapped: Donna Scrivo
programme.desc: The discovery of a dismembered man rocks a close-knit town as shocking accusations spread about the alleged culprit—his doting mother.

programme.title: Snapped: Sarah McLinn
programme.desc: A shocking murder raises questions about a young woman, her relationship with her boss and the possibility of multiple personalities.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Graham
programme.desc: In a shocking turn of events, a mother must face her demons when her daughter is left for dead after a vicious murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Stephanie Olson
programme.desc: After a single mother is found murdered in her Kentucky home, detectives must follow a twisted trail littered with lies to identify the mastermind behind this vicious killing.

programme.title: Snapped: The Case Continues: Jodi Arias
programme.desc: With Jodi Arias back in the headlines in 2019, we take another look into the media circus surrounding Jodi's sensational trial and question whether that frenzy, along with other claims, could possibly play a part in a new trial for Arias.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Crack in Everything
programme.desc: For many, the holiday season is filled with joy but, for the Jennings family, the night before Christmas became a waking nightmare. A gunshot rang out and investigators had to unravel whether a secret lead to a tragic suicide or if this was murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Ransom
programme.desc: It began with a young mom abducted at gunpoint. Her family and veteran investigators spent desperate days trying to find out where she was but they never could have guessed who had her and why.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Somebody’s Daughter
programme.desc: Detectives often hit dead ends that can stop them cold but, for one young detective, dead ends were just another place to start. She'd beaten the odds in her own life. Now, she was determined to beat them on the job using her head and her heart.

programme.title: Snapped: Shayna Hubers
programme.desc: A beautiful college student and a successful attorney looked the perfect couple, but a shooting reveals the shocking secrets in their relationship.

programme.title: Snapped: Shaunna Dodd
programme.desc: A deadly home invasion leads to questions about a popular bartender, illegal drugs and the murder of her husband.

programme.title: Snapped: Marjorie Orbin
programme.desc: Police unravel the mystery of a former Vegas showgirl, a dismembered body and a missing husband.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in a Small Town
programme.desc: Her life ended in mystery on a dead-end road. A mother of three, she was beloved by her family and tight-knit community. For years the murder investigation went cold, however secrets have a way of eventually coming out.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Big sky country and a dangerous highway set the scene of a fatal car crash. Was the tragedy an accident, or was the crash a crime, were the secrets masking the truth hiding in text messages sent just before a car crossed the line.

programme.title: Snapped: Ann Trexler
programme.desc: Grandma Ann Trexler moved to Florida to spend more time with her granddaughter. When the girl's father decided to move her to Montana, Ann hired a hitman to bring the relocation plan to a dead stop.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Mountain City, TN
programme.desc: A gruesome execution style double murder of a young couple shakes a small mountain community in Eastern Tennessee. With no evidence or DNA left at the crime scene, police rely on the rumor mill and their instincts to try and identify suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Largo, FL
programme.desc: A kind hearted single mother is found brutally murdered, inside her own home. Three potential suspects quickly arise, all claiming innocence, and it’s up to the Largo Police detectives to find out who is the cold blooded killer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: Chris Watts: Confession Untold
programme.desc: Investigators speak for the first time on one of the most baffling cases they've encountered, exposing the devastating truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of seemingly devoted husband and father, Chris Watts.

programme.title: Snapped: Ana Trujillo
programme.desc: A prominent scientist is bludgeoned to death with a blue stiletto heel.

programme.title: Snapped: Denise Bozarth
programme.desc: After a man is found dead on his boat, questions surface about his past and his wife.

programme.title: Snapped: Ghazal Mansury
programme.desc: When a 79-year old woman goes missing, her daughter blames dementia but the rest of her family suspects someone much closer to home.

programme.title: Snapped: Dawn Fowler
programme.desc: A church congregation is shocked when a deadly home invasion turns out to be part of a scandalous web of sex, lies and greed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge and Homer Turn a Couple Play
programme.desc: After a passionate kiss between Marge and Homer airs on the Isotope Jumbotron, struggling second baseman Buck Mitchell turns to the couple for marital advice. The Simpsons are able to get Buck and his sexy singing wife, Fiona, on track.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Mook, the Chef, the Wife and Her Homer
programme.desc: After Lisa befriends Fat Tony's son Michael, Fat Tony invites the Simpsons over for dinner as a sign of gratitude. Shockingly, Fat Tony is shot by a rival family moments after Michael admits he would rather be a chef than take over the family business.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Jazzy and the Pussycats
programme.desc: When Bart turns a quiet funeral into a chaotic mess, his parents are faced with a mob of angry Springfieldians who have had enough. Homer and Marge look to a child psychiatrist for help, who suggests that Bart take up drumming to channel his energy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Please Homer, Don't Hammer 'Em
programme.desc: Hoping to see a new side to Homer, Marge convinces him to buy a refined collection of carpentry books. To Marge's dismay, the books only gather dust until she accidentally breaks a nightstand and uses the books to fix it herself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII
programme.desc: A meteor falls to Earth and reveals a green goo that Homer mistakes for marshmallow. Bart brings Golem to life and forces him to carry out his bidding. A radio broadcast convinces the people of Springfield that they're in the midst of an alien invasion.

programme.title: The Simpsons: G.I. D'oh
programme.desc: After Bart gets out of a commitment to join the army at 18, Homer falls prey to a couple of army recruiters and lands himself in basic training. Homer, of course, treats it like summer camp and infuriates his hard-nosed colonel.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe'N'A Lisa
programme.desc: When Homer forgets Moe's birthday, Moe's anger inspires Lisa to write about him for her school report. She finds a poetic side to Moe and helps him get published in 'American Poetry Perspectives.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Ice Cream of Margie (With the Light Blue Hair)
programme.desc: After Homer gets fired at the nuclear power plant, he takes over the ice cream truck business, while a depressed Marge creates popsicle stick sculptures to keep busy. The sculptures quickly become popular and Marge is excited to have a purpose in life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Haw-Hawed Couple
programme.desc: After Bart convinces all his friends not to go to Nelson's birthday party, Marge forces him to attend. After the party, Bart becomes Nelson's new best friend, and under Nelson's protection, no one dares to mess with Bart.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kill Gil, Volumes 1 & 2
programme.desc: The family is stuck with an unwanted houseguest after they open their home to Gil for the Christmas holidays. After a full year, an attempt at getting him a job and many failed 'accidents,' Marge finally grows a spine and throws Gil out Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wife Aquatic
programme.desc: While watching a home movie, Marge becomes depressed as she is reminded of memorable childhood vacations spent at Barnacle Bay. Hating to see Marge sad, Homer and the kids take her on a surprise trip to the bay.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times
programme.desc: The Simpson family tells each other tales of revenge gone wrong. Marge offers a cautionary tale of revenge from 19th century France before Bart's story follows the great crime-fighter 'Red Revenge.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Little Big Girl
programme.desc: Lisa decides to take creative licence in crafting her heritage as a Native American when she discovers that the Simpson family tree is less than exciting. The innocent embellishment leads to her speaking at the National Native American Tribal Council.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Springfield Up
programme.desc: A documentary filmmaker offers an inside look at his work chronicling the growth and development of some of Springfield's finest. Marge puts her photojournalism dream on hold in order to support Homer as he tries out odd jobs in search of success.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Yokel Chords
programme.desc: When Lisa protests denying education to Cletus's children, Principal Skinner offers her a chance to tutor the kids herself. Lisa's plans to help are diverted when Krusty spots the kids during their field trip and decides to use them as a musical act.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rome-Old and Julie-Eh
programme.desc: When Homer incorrectly files for bankruptcy, the court appoints an accountant for him. Grampa and Selma fall in love and move in together, and Homer and Patty plot to break up their love connection.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerazzi
programme.desc: Marge is inspired to purchase a fireproof safe to protect the family's most precious valuables after a candle on Homer's birthday cake sets fire to his party hat. A freak accident causes the safe to explode, forcing Marge to restage the family's photos.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Gamer
programme.desc: Marge takes a chance using the Internet after she becomes a spectacle during a PTA meeting for not having an email address. Marge becomes amazed by what the Internet has to offer and joins a role-playing fantasy game called 'Earthland Realms.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Boys of Bummer
programme.desc: Bart becomes a hometown hero when he makes the game-winning catch at his ball game. However, the town turns on him when he drops an easy pop fly in the bottom of the ninth.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Crook and Ladder
programme.desc: Maggie goes on a path of destruction after Marge throws away her pacifier. Marge gives in and sends Homer to the store to get a new pacifier, but he can't find the right brand, so Maggie comes up with her own solution.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Stop, or My Dog Will Shoot!
programme.desc: Santa's Little Helper becomes a local hero and the family enrol him into Police Academy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 24 Minutes
programme.desc: With the help of Jack Bauer and Chloe O'Brian, Bart and Lisa must stop a group of bullies from releasing the ultimate stink bomb at the school's annual bake sale.

programme.title: The Simpsons: You Kent Always Say What You Want
programme.desc: Kent Brockman uses a shocking expletive during the nightly news broadcast and is fired when the FCC is tipped off. The dejected anchor takes refuge with the Simpsons and Lisa plots a way to get him his position back.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: The Simpsons: He Loves to Fly and He D'ohs
programme.desc: After Homer saves Mr. Burns from drowning, Burns thanks him by taking him on a whirlwind trip to Chicago on his private plane. After returning home, Homer makes it his mission to find a job that offers him the chance to fly on a corporate jet.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer of Seville
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires Homer to sing the lead in his production of 'La Bohème.' Homer wows the crowd and escapes a mob of crazed fans with the help of a mysterious woman who seems a little too concerned with Homer's well being.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Midnight Towboy
programme.desc: Feeling that Maggie is getting too clingy, Marge hires a counsellor to teach her to become more independent. Meanwhile, Homer gets a little too carried away with his new job as a tow truck driver.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Don't Wanna Know Why the Caged Bird Sings
programme.desc: Marge convinces a bank robber, Dwight, to turn himself over to the police by promising to visit him in prison. When Marge fails to keep her promise, Dwight escapes to find her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII
programme.desc: The fright fest begins in 'Mr. and Mrs. Simpson' as Homer and Marge leave for what appears to be an ordinary day. But Homer is living a double life as a secret agent, and he is assigned to eliminate Kent Brockman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Little Orphan Millie
programme.desc: When Milhouse's parents are lost at sea and presumed dead, his new orphan status makes him cooler than Bart. Meanwhile, Homer gets himself in hot water when he can't remember the colour of Marge's eyes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Husbands and Knives
programme.desc: Bart, Lisa and Milhouse check out a new comic book store called Coolsville and are treated like royalty. Meanwhile, Marge launches a gym for 'regular women,' and Homer fears she will dump him unless he gets into shape.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Funeral for a Fiend
programme.desc: When Bart accidentally kills his nemesis Sideshow Bob, Bob's brother Cecil invites him to a memorial service with the intention of burying the hatchet for good.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Eternal Moonshine of the Simpson Mind
programme.desc: Homer wakens on a snowy winter morning and has to reconstruct his memory of the previous night when he finds that Marge and the kids are nowhere to be found.

programme.title: The Simpsons: E. Pluribus Wiggum
programme.desc: When Quimby pushes up the town's election, Springfield becomes the first city in the nation to hold a presidential primary. Springfield's citizens are less than happy with the candidates, so they embrace a write-in instead: Ralph Wiggum.

programme.title: The Simpsons: That '90s Show
programme.desc: Marge and Homer recount how Homer single-handedly started the grunge movement in the '90s. When Marge becomes attracted to a university professor, Homer gives up his job and focuses on his dream of being a musician.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love, Springfieldian Style
programme.desc: When Marge and Homer get trapped in a tunnel of love, they entertain each other with their takes on the Bonnie and Clyde, the 'Lady and the Tramp' and the Sex Pistols romances.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Debarted
programme.desc: A new tough-talking kid teams up with Bart to pull off pranks. When Bart's pranks seem to backfire, Groundskeeper Willie warns him that he may have a rat in his group of friends. Bart must figure out who the backstabber is before it's too late.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dial 'N' for Nerder
programme.desc: Marge hires a nutritionist who puts Homer on a strict diet, but Homer decides to sneak in snacks and meals on the side. Bart and Lisa believe they are responsible for the accidental death of Martin Prince when their prank goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Smoke on the Daughter
programme.desc: Lisa becomes addicted to second-hand smoke when she believes it is responsible for her improved ballet performance. Meanwhile, when a family of raccoons makes off with Homer's beef jerky, he decides to confront the animals.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Papa Don't Leech
programme.desc: Former country star Lurleen Lumpkin has an outstanding tax debt to the city of Springfield. As citizens scour the city to find her, Marge reluctantly permits the fugitive to stay with the family.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Apocalypse Cow
programme.desc: Bart joins the 4-H Club and unexpectedly falls in love with a cow named Lou. When he finds out that Lou has been sold to a slaughterhouse, he becomes determined to save him. Bart gives the cow to club member Mary, whose father mistakes it for a dowry.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Any Given Sundance
programme.desc: When Lisa's documentary on her family premieres at the Sundance Film Festival, Homer, Marge and Bart are embarrassed by the candid behind-the-scenes look at their lives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mona Leaves-A
programme.desc: When Homer's mother unexpectedly passes away, he is filled with guilt for not telling her how much he loved her. To make up for it, Homer decides to fulfill her final wishes by throwing her ashes over Lake Wastershare at Springfield Monument Park.

programme.title: The Simpsons: All About Lisa
programme.desc: As Krusty's new assistant, Lisa steals the spotlight and gets her own show, leaving Krusty behind. Meanwhile, Bart and Homer spend some time bonding through their newfound love of coin collecting.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sex, Pies and Idiot-Scrapes
programme.desc: Homer is sent to jail after a haphazard, booze-free brawl at the Springfield St. Patrick's Day parade. When he goes to get his bail bond, Homer meets Lucky Jim and Wolf the Bounty Hunter and decides to try his own hand at the lucrative profession.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Voyage of the Damned
programme.desc: The TARDIS collides with a spacecraft replica of the Titanic and the Doctor must make a stand against a race of android angels.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Next Doctor
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in 1851 and Cybermen stalk the snow of Victorian London. When the Doctor arrives and starts to investigate a spate of mysterious deaths, he's surprised to meet another Doctor, with his own sonic screwdriver and cockney assistant.

programme.title: Doctor Who: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Amy and Rory are trapped on a crashing space liner and the only way the Doctor can rescue them is by saving the soul of a lonely old miser.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Doctor, the Widow and the Wardrobe
programme.desc: Evacuated to a house in Dorset from war-torn London, Madge Arwell and her two children, Lily and Cyril, are greeted by a madcap caretaker whose mysterious Christmas gift leads them into a magical wintry world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Snowmen
programme.desc: An old friend and an unorthodox young governess must bring the Doctor out of mourning so he can face the chilling menace threatening humankind on Christmas Eve 1892.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time of the Doctor
programme.desc: The Doctor must sacrifice everything to save a town called Christmas from the Time Lord's greatest enemies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Last Christmas
programme.desc: The Doctor and Clara face their last Christmas. Trapped on an arctic base and under attack from terrifying creatures, they call on Santa Claus for help.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Husbands of River Song
programme.desc: It's Christmas Day for a remote human colony and the Doctor is hiding from Christmas Carols and comedy antlers. When a crashed spaceship calls upon the Doctor, he finds himself recruited into River Song's squad and into a chase across the galaxy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Return of Doctor Mysterio
programme.desc: Nardole and the Doctor join forces with a masked hero known as 'The Ghost' to fend off brain-swapping aliens.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Twice Upon a Time
programme.desc: The magical final chapter of the twelfth Doctor's journey sees the Time Lord team up with his former self, the first ever Doctor, and a returning Bill Potts, for one last adventure.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Rose
programme.desc: Shop girl Rose Tyler finds herself attacked by mannequins one night and a mysterious man comes to her rescue. The following day, Rose and her boyfriend look for answers as to the mystery man's identity and uncover the identity of the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The End of the World
programme.desc: The Doctor takes Rose on her first voyage through time to witness the death of Planet Earth, but someone is planning sabotage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Unquiet Dead
programme.desc: The Doctor takes Rose to 1869, where Charles Dickens joins the battle against the Gelth.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Aliens of London
programme.desc: Rose returns home, but when a spaceship crashlands in the Thames, she discovers an alien invasion right on her doorstep.

programme.title: Doctor Who: World War III
programme.desc: With the Doctor, Rose and Harriet Jones trapped inside Downing Street, the world edges towards mankind's first Interplanetary War.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Empty Child
programme.desc: At the height of the Blitz, the bombsites of London are haunted by an unearthly child.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Doctor Dances
programme.desc: The Child's plague is spreading throughout wartime London, and its zombie army is on the march.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Boom Town
programme.desc: When the Tardis crew takes a holiday, the Doctor encounters an enemy he thought long-since dead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Bad Wolf
programme.desc: The crew fight for their lives on the Game Station, but a greater danger lurks nearby.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Parting of the Ways
programme.desc: Rose and the Doctor's friendship is put to the test as Earth plunges into an epic war with the human race being slaughtered.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Smith and Jones
programme.desc: The Doctor meets Martha Jones, a medical student in London, under unusual circumstances when her entire hospital is transported to the Moon.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Arctic Discipline
programme.desc: Alaskans must save themselves, and each other, to endure the harsh winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ultimate Sacrifice
programme.desc: In the face of winter’s adversity, Alaskans must make difficult decisions to survive.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Winter Inferno
programme.desc: The Arctic is melting at a rapid rate, and residents of Alaska must scramble to adapt.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Winter's End
programme.desc: The end of winter season is quickly approaching, and for Chip and Agnes Hailstone this means that they have one last chance to harvest fat caribou until late summer.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Blood
programme.desc: Alaskans work to gather newly available resources with the spring season underway.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Snow Daze
programme.desc: The treacherous winters in the arctic create dangerous circumstances for Alaskans.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Winter Inferno
