programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Turn to Gold
programme.desc: Find out what trick Michael loves to perform at parties and which trick was inspired by his fascination with superhero movies. Plus, learn the name of his favorite wig.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Relax the Back

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Ambush: Exercise Surprise
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine is ready to take on the challenge of turning around a failing restaurant in just two days with only $10,000.

programme.desc: Robert Irvine receives a plea from the owners of BFE Bar and Grill in Waynesboro, Ga. The restaurant is deep in debt, and their liquor license has been suspended. Robert quickly learns he will have to pick and choose what to fix.

programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine rolls up to the Southern Grille of Ellendale, Delaware. The owner of the Southern-style restaurant, Ronald, is working too hard to be in so much debt. If Robert can't help him reconnect with his restaurant, this local spot is doomed.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Never Too Late

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: The family of Mutt, an employee who recently passed away, meets the dog that he chose for them. A stray near a middle school leads Tia and M2 on a wild good chase. And, Lizzy and Moe tackle the challenging task of renovating the dog agility course.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Tia Maria Torres works to save pit bulls from dangerous and abusive situations.

programme.desc: Dozens of dogs are rescued from a house fire which uncovers a ghastly hoarding problem. Teachers instantly fall in love with a deaf puppy named Timberlake and make plans to bring it home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Found a Forever Home: Hound Dog Hotel
programme.desc: A dehydrated dog struggles to survive in the intense heat, and a special-needs pup is sent to VRC's satellite location for more advanced care. Tia and the twins assist an old friend of the rescue to find a compatible match.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Found a Forever Home: Big Apple Road Trip
programme.desc: Villalobos heads to New York City's Dog Bowl to show off a few of their rescues. M2 takes on the plight of a severely neglected pup and an excited couple begins their adoption journey with a visit to VRC.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs That Stole Our Hearts
programme.desc: Tia, her kids and the extended Villalobos family reveal the behind the scenes stories of the dogs that have stolen their hearts over the years.

programme.desc: Pete and his family gear up to expand their treehouse empire on 23 acres of forest wonderland. As construction kicks off, Pete enlists his son Charlie to oversee the project and builds an incredible treehouse home base for him to live in fulltime.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Appalachian Christmas Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and his merry men trek to the Blue Ridge Mountains to build a treehouse for one of their own, carpenter Mike Reynolds. Sitting 16 feet high, it will be the perfect rustic guesthouse to host the raucous Appalachian Breaking Up Christmas tradition.

programme.title: Tanked!: We Fish You a Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett team up with Australian pop star Alli Simpson to help spread some holiday cheer. They travel to Flint, Michigan, to donate an incredible aquarium to the Children's Miracle Network and the Hurley Children's Hospital.

programme.title: Tanked!: A Merry Fishy Christmas
programme.desc: Ethel M Chocolate Factory is gearing up for their annual holiday cactus lighting event and have tasked Wayde and Brett with building the ultimate holiday tank. Meanwhile Heather's surprising Wayde with a gift not even St Nick could deliver.

programme.title: Tanked!: Betty White's Got an App for That

programme.title: Tanked!: Howie Mandel's Surprise Tank

programme.title: Tanked!: Shaq-Sized

programme.title: Tanked!: Alyssa's Charmed Tank

programme.title: Tanked!: Kevin Smith's Tortally Awesome Tank

programme.title: Golf Films: Arnie: His Army
programme.desc: See how Mr. Palmer's parents raised him to be the great man he is today, as well as how he revolutionized the game of golf and influenced the sports marketing industry.

programme.title: Golf Films: Arnie: The Majors
programme.desc: See how Mr. Palmer's beloved style of play allowed him to win prestigious titles such as the U.S. Amateur, U.S. Open, The Masters and the Open Championship.

programme.title: Golf Films: Arnie: His Legacy
programme.desc: Get an in-depth look into the many business and charities Mr. Palmer is involved in, including golf course design and management, the PGA Tour's Arnold Palmer Invitational, and the hospitals in his name.

programme.title: Shell's Wonderful World of Golf: Byron Nelson vs. Gene Littler
programme.desc: Classic golf match between two time Masters winner Byron Nelson and Gene Littler.

programme.title: Shell's Wonderful World of Golf: Arnold Palmer vs. Julius Boros
programme.desc: Arnold Palmer vs Julius Boros played at Cotton Bay Country Club, Bahamas.

programme.title: Shell's Wonderful World of Golf: Gene Sarazen vs. Henry Cotton
programme.desc: Classic golf match between Gene Sarazen and Henry Cotton.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 1: Back to Basics
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal take you back to basics to achieve an ideal impact position with your feet, hands, hips and shoulders. Martin will reveal how a Samurai sword came in handy for Jack Nicklaus throughout his career and how it can help you.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 2: Power Pointers
programme.desc: Martin and Blair reveal ways to gain distance like some of golf's greatest champions. Learn a simple backswing move used by Jack Nicklaus, exercises to increase clubhead speed like Rory McIlroy and power tips from a book by Sam Snead.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 3: Putting Class
programme.desc: Martin and Blair are enrolling you in putting class. Learn how to control the line and speed of your putts like the best players in the world. There will also be a lesson on how to match your putting stroke with the different styles of putter.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 4: Wedge Wizard
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O’Neal will teach how to become a wedge wizard around the green. Learn how to chip like WGC-Mexico defending champion Phil Mickelson, who appeared on School of Golf in 2017 to share his short game secrets.

programme.title: School of Golf: Chapter 5: Stop the Slice
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O’Neal will teach setup and swing keys for players that need to stop the slice. Martin will share a drill that helped one of his students win a major championship and a tip he learned this past offseason working with Rory McIlroy.

programme.title: Pop-Up Golf Clinic: Rory McIlroy
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins many of the top junior golfers in the world at Sage Valley Golf Club in Graniteville, South Carolina, to demonstrate how to get massive distance off the tee, strike the ball in the centre of the club face and dial in wedges.

programme.title: Golf Films: Jack: Prodigy
programme.desc: Jack Nicklaus's early years are profiled. Topics include his relationship with his father, his time in college at Ohio State, meeting his wife and his first triumphs as a professional golfer.

programme.title: Golf Films: Jack: Prime
programme.desc: Look at the prime of Jack Nicklaus's career where he amassed a record 18 major championships and 43 victories on the PGA tour.

programme.title: Golf Films: Jack: Pinnacle
programme.desc: Relive the twilight years of Jack Nicklaus's career and the charitable contributions he made after his retirement from professional golf.

programme.title: Golf Highlights: 2019 Valspar Championship: Paul Casey
programme.desc: Highlights of golf events from around the U.S. and the world.

programme.title: Golf Highlights: 2019 WGC: Dell Technologies Match Play - Kevin Kisner
programme.desc: Highlights of golf events from around the U.S. and the world.

programme.title: Golf Highlights: 2019 Corales Puntacana Resort and Club Championship: Graeme McDowell
programme.desc: Highlights of golf events from around the U.S. and the world.

programme.title: Golf Highlights: 2019 Valero Texas Open: Corey Conners
programme.desc: Highlights of golf events from around the U.S. and the world.

programme.title: American Pickers: The Bundle Brothers
programme.desc: Two brothers are better than one when it comes to negotiating, which has Mike looking to bundle in order to save his bottom line.

programme.title: American Pickers: No Stoner Left Unturned
programme.desc: The guys meet a man who had pieces on display in the Smithsonian, but find that what he's held on to is even more mind-blowing. A father/ daughter power struggle is a roadblock to picking a century farm.

programme.desc: The guys double-team a packed property to find what they're looking for before nightfall.

programme.title: American Pickers: Double Bubble Trouble

programme.title: American Pickers: The Doctor Is Waiting
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are scolded when they arrive late for an appointment with Dr. Fred. Once they get past his grumpy assistant, they find themselves in a strange world filled with all kinds of weird and wonderful things.

programme.title: American Pickers: Bonus Buys: California Picking

programme.title: American Pickers: Mr. Whizzer
programme.desc: Honoring a beloved father with a massive stockpile of rusty gold, two sisters in upstate New York invite the guys to pick through their dads untouched garage.

programme.title: American Pickers: Woody's Picking Paradise
programme.desc: An enormous 200,000-square-foot factory holds Woody's private collection. Mike and Frank are extremely enticed by this dumpster diver's treasure trove.

programme.title: UFO Files: Real UFOs
programme.desc: Ever since the military started using sophisticated airplanes, they have sought ways to build an aircraft that can fly undetected, manoeuvre like a helicopter and fly like a jet. The Nazis first pursued the idea of a disc-shaped aircraft.

programme.title: UFO Files: Texas' Roswell
programme.desc: Five years before the Wright Brothers flew at Kitty Hawk, a mysterious airship crashes in the town of Aurora, Texas in 1897. This episode separates fact from fiction as we hunt for the alien graveyard and study the mysterious metal found at the site.

programme.title: UFO Files: Alien Engineering
programme.desc: Recreate a typical alien space ship to understand why aliens choose the craft shapes they do, and learn how they overcome the effects of Earth's atmosphere. This episode also explores the technology that would permit us to travel and visit other worlds.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Visitors
programme.desc: The Dogone people possess knowledge of a galaxy they claim was given to them by a star god named Amma. The Hopi and Zuni people celebrate Kachinas, gods from the sky, whose headdresses and costumes appear to resemble modern helmets.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Return
programme.desc: There is evidence that suggests we have experienced 20th century alien contact. In 1942 the US Military allegedly did battle with an alien spacecraft and WWII Allied Air Force planes were once buzzed by strange balls of light.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Beyond Nazca
programme.desc: Investigating if Nazca have been a mining operation for advanced beings in the distant past.

programme.title: Movie: Young Winston
programme.desc: A look at the early life of Winston Churchill, from his childhood to his first election.

programme.title: Movie: Young Catherine
programme.desc: A teenager who married into the royal family of eighteenth-century Russia became a queen.

programme.title: Movie: The Cincinnati Kid
programme.desc: Card sharps try to deal with personal problems during a big game in New Orleans.

programme.title: Movie: The Opposite Sex
programme.desc: A happily married singer lets her catty friends convince her to file for divorce from her producer husband when she finds out he cheated on her with a gold digging girl in one of his shows.

programme.title: Movie: This Could Be The Night
programme.desc: A schoolteacher finds a job as a secretary at a nightclub and falls in love with her boss.

programme.title: Movie: Angel Baby
programme.desc: Married promoters try to turn a faith healer into a gold mine.

programme.title: Movie: Advance to the Rear
programme.desc: A tough commanding officer and his colleague lead a band of Yankee soldiers.

programme.title: Movie: The Verdict
programme.desc: An alcoholic attorney is given a malpractice case as his last chance at redemption.

programme.title: Movie: Passage to Marseille
programme.desc: A journalist escapes a prison camp and later joins the RAF during the Second World War.

programme.title: Movie: Background to Danger
programme.desc: An intelligence agent obtains secret papers containing Nazi plans to invade Turkey.

programme.title: Movie: Flamingo Road
programme.desc: A tough dancer tries to survive in a world of sleazy characters and corrupt politics.

programme.title: Movie: Pillow to Post
programme.desc: A saleswoman tries to pass herself off as a serviceman's wife in order to stay at the inn.

programme.title: Movie: The Hucksters
programme.desc: An advertising executive finds himself becoming increasingly corrupt with every account.

programme.title: Jessie: No Money, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Mrs. Chesterfield has cut off Brooks financially, so Tony and Jessie get Brooks a job as an elevator attendant. Mrs. Chesterfield is appalled and has Betram go on a mission to get dirt on Jessie than can lead to her and Brooks' breakup.

programme.title: Jessie: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: When Brooks lands a job in Africa and has to be there in two days, he and Jessie are forced to move up their wedding.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: I Know What You Did Last Sleepover
programme.desc: Sydney and Olive are excited for their weeklong sleepover. Young Max and Leo get in a fight about Max constantly forgetting his job responsibilities at the arcade.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Caved and Confused
programme.desc: Judy enlists Grandma Judy to help her redesign the basement into their very own 'girl cave.' Max starts to feel left out when Sydney cancels their plans together to throw a 50s-themed party with her friends to celebrate her new space.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Nuthin' But a Dance Thang
programme.desc: Syd thinks she's too old for the father-daughter dance, but she's afraid to hurt Dad's feelings. Young Max is bummed when his Dad isn't around for a father-son event.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friend-Ship
programme.desc: Raven and the kids plan a road trip to visit Chelsea at her cruise ship and encounter several obstacles along the way.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Lost at Chel-Sea
programme.desc: The kids accidentally get stuck on a cruise ship alone, while Raven and Chelsea desperately try to catch up with them via Jet Ski.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Twister, Sister
programme.desc: When Booker challenges Nia's efforts as an activist, she follows her dad to where he's reporting on a storm to prove to herself and her brother that she is indeed an activist and not a "positivist."

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Dia De La Dina
programme.desc: 'Dia de la Dina' is coming and Gabby is determined to get her mom a gift that makes up for last year's disaster. Meanwhile, Swift prepares for the end of his assignment on Earth.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Darkness
programme.desc: When Gabby discovers Swift is still on earth, she's determined to get him back as principal because his replacement is a nightmare.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Party King and Timbuk, Too
programme.desc: When Gabby decides to throw a party for Jeremy at the Duran house, things quickly get out of hand with some unexpected guests.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Date Fright
programme.desc: When Byron and Rachel set out to have an "official" date night, Owen and Blair convince their parents to let them stay home alone without a babysitter for the first time. As the night unfolds, the kids make a series of bad decisions.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Family Squabbles
programme.desc: The Bennett-Blatts are invited to be contestants on 'Family Squabbles', a game show that tests a family’s knowledge of one another.

programme.title: Andi Mack: Something To Talk A-Boot
programme.desc: Andi makes a big decision about her future; T.J.'s act of kindness toward Buffy lands him in trouble; Amber asks Jonah for some space.

programme.title: Andi Mack: A Moving Day
programme.desc: Andi and her family take a road trip; while helping Jonah move, Buffy and Cyrus are surprised to learn the identity of his famous mom.

programme.title: Andi Mack: We Were Here
programme.desc: When Celia leaves town, Andi and Bex throw another party; Buffy and Cyrus share relationship woes; Andi shares a secret.

programme.title: Jessie: Karate Kid-tastrophe
programme.desc: Emma rebels with loud music, adult clothes, and a bad attitude. She ends up getting suspended from school and running away. Jessie learns her whereabouts and manages to get Emma to open up about what's bugging her.

programme.title: Jessie: Moby and Scoby
programme.desc: When Jessie goes back to college, her and Ravi end up sharing the same class. Zuri brings home a baby giraffe from Africa.

programme.title: Jessie: Basket Case
programme.desc: Eager to play in Luke's basketball game, Ravi unexpectedly runs into LA Clippers star Chris Paul, who he enlists to coach him. Meanwhile, Jessie learns that Hudson is her new classmate and is unhappily forced to partner with him for an assignment.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Tiny House-A-Rooney
programme.desc: When Maddie and Willow discover that one of their acquaintances is homeless, they set out to help him. Meanwhile Karen gets discovered by a modeling agent and Joey and Parker attempt to sneak into a movie.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Big Break-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Joey is invited to perform stand-up at the hottest comedy club in Los Angeles by his idol comedian Jim Breuer. Meanwhile, Parker enlists Liv and Maddie to help him with a science experiment.

programme.title: Bunk'd: It's a Blast!
programme.desc: The campers participate in a model rocket competition with three rounds: altitude, speed, and safety.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Up, Up, and Away
programme.desc: When Emma, Zuri, and Ravi get new jobs, they learn their mom plans to sell the camp. Concerned that Lou will be devastated, they decide to tell her on a hot air balloon ride.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Who da Boss? Lou da Boss!
programme.desc: It's a new summer at Camp Kikiwaka as Lou takes over as camp director and welcomes new camper Gwen and camp counselors Noah and Ava.

programme.title: Jessie: We Are So Grounded
programme.desc: Jessie, Bertram and the kids head to Bali for a family vacation, but when their private jet starts to fail, Jessie takes control of the cockpit and makes an emergency landing on a tropical island.

programme.title: Jessie: The Secret Life of Mr. Kipling
programme.desc: After finding a nest of eggs on the terrace, Jessie and Ravi discover that Mr. Kipling is really Ms. Kipling, and a mom-to-be. After misplacing her eggs, Ravi realizes he may have to work at becoming a better grandparent to baby lizards.

programme.title: Jessie: Cattle Calls and Scary Walls
programme.desc: Jessie auditions for a role in a television series and is convinced that she can talk her way into getting the part. However, it's Zuri who impresses the director. Emma, who Jessie left in charge at home, joins Ravi and Luke to look for rats in the walls.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Campy Camper Day!/ Founder's Day Flounder!
programme.desc: While on a camping trip, Mickey, Donald and Daisy can't unplug from their electronic devices. Mickey and the gang celebrate the 100th birthday of Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Eau de Minnie
Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar

programme.title: Snapped: Loretta Burroughs
programme.desc: The search for a missing man leads to a disturbing discovery years later deep in his wife’s closet.

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Fenton
programme.desc: A woman finds her husband dead and proclaims her innocence, but questions about his wealth, a suspicious fire and her scandalous past raise red flags.

programme.title: Snapped: Stacey Shoeck
programme.desc: The murder of a devoted family man leads investigators through a twisted tale of infidelity, betrayal and one woman’s deadly plan.

programme.title: Snapped: Tracie Miles
programme.desc: When a Kansas mother is discovered brutally murdered in her own home, investigators fear that her missing teenage daughter has met a similar fate. They scour the area for clues until rumors guide them to an unlikely mastermind.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: When Hate Kills
programme.desc: Police in small town Louisiana investigate the mysterious and brutal murder of a beloved neighbor with no known enemies.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Heartbreak
programme.desc: A beloved couple is found murdered inside their home on Christmas morning. All that's left behind is a single palm print. Investigators work tirelessly to match the print to a suspect, until a letter from prison takes the case on an unexpected course.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Just after Christmas, a young couple is found murdered inside their Florida home. Neighbors can't imagine the couple had been in the area long enough to make a mortal enemy. Police uncover deeply personal details, and soon expose a deadly secret.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Rager
programme.desc: Just before Christmas, the body of a young mother is found strangled inside a burning car in a quiet Minneapolis suburb. As detectives hunt for her killer, they become convinced she was killed by someone very close to her.

programme.title: Snapped: Teresa Kotomski
programme.desc: A woman faces tough decisions when her husband is on life support due to a mysterious illness.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: When Hate Kills
programme.desc: Police in small town Louisiana investigate the mysterious and brutal murder of a beloved neighbor with no known enemies.

programme.title: Snapped: Judy Parker
programme.desc: A business man's mysterious death sends police on a years-long investigation that leads to suspicions of those nearest and dearest to him.

programme.title: Dateline: The Girl With the Red Shoes
programme.desc: A teenage girl is murdered at a scenic spot on a Utah river. The case almost goes cold until a hairdresser turned detective, with the help of the victim's determined mom, finds the truth. Dennis Murphy reports.

programme.title: Dateline: Manson
programme.desc: Keith Morrison takes a compelling new look at the Manson murders, the mystery that gripped the country during the summer of 1969. View rarely-seen footage from the NBC archives including interviews with Charles Manson.

programme.title: Dateline: Good and Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at an Anaheim trash facility, a dedicated detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know that search will bring her face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Michelle Young was married to her college sweetheart and pregnant with their second child when she was murdered. In the search for her killer, detectives uncovered a marriage riddled with secrets but cracking this complicated case took years.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Suspicion
programme.desc: The neighbors you’re about to meet enjoyed mixing business with pleasure then a murder made them face the reality that a killer was in their midst.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: She was beautiful, trusting and troubled. The young woman from a prominent family was just turning it around and realizing her promise. Then she vanished. When the police seemed unable to find her, her family hatched a plan to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Blind Justice
programme.desc: For investigators, motive can be the hardest thing to find. This crime took place in Florida but detectives didn't discover a motive for murder until they looked into a tropical island thousands of miles away, where a festering grudge was born.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Weinberger was a successful surgeon hiding a secret from his medical staff and from his adoring wife. There was a malpractice suit and a death. Then the doctor vanished, sparking an international manhunt and a family's fight for justice.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lost Verizon
programme.desc: Bart finds Dennis Leary's cell phone and uses it to make prank phone calls all over the world. When Marge finds out, she and Leary devise a plan to activate a GPS system and track Bart's every move.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Double Double Boy in Trouble
programme.desc: Bart meets his exact look-alike, Simon Woosterfield, who happens to be a member of the richest family in Springfield. When the boys decide to switch places, Bart learns that his wealthy 'siblings' are plotting his demise so they can get his inheritance.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIX
programme.desc: Homer kills off celebrities so their likenesses can be exploited free-of-charge. Transformer-like robots duke it out in Springfield. Lisa accompanies Milhouse to a pumpkin patch to await the appearance of the Grand Pumpkin, who finally appears.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangerous Curves
programme.desc: When the Simpson family takes a road trip to a cabin in the woods, a series of flashbacks depict Homer and Marge's blissful courtship and their early, married years.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer and Lisa Exchange Cross Words
programme.desc: Lisa discovers her amazing talent for doing crossword puzzles and becomes an expert cruciverbalist, and she soon enters a citywide crossword puzzle tournament. Homer discovers an underground crossword-betting ring.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mypods and Boomsticks
programme.desc: Bart befriends a Muslim boy, Bashir, but Homer becomes suspicious. After insulting the family and snooping around their personal business, Homer believes the family is involved in orchestrating a terrorist plot to blow up the local mall.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Burns and the Bees
programme.desc: Lisa tries to save the endangered Springfield bee population from Mr. Burns and his new sports arena. Homer attempts to help the quickly diminishing bee population by mating the Springfield bees with Africanized bees, creating a fiasco.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Drama Queen
programme.desc: Lisa meets an equally academic and creative new friend named Juliet, and together they construct a fantasy world that takes them both a little too far from reality.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Take My Life, Please
programme.desc: When Mayor Quimby inducts Vance Connor into the Springfield Walk of Fame, Homer recounts how he ran against Vance for class president in high school and lost. A magical tomato sauce reveals what Homer's life could have been if he had won.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How the Test Was Won
programme.desc: After learning that Bart received a perfect score on a practice assessment test, Lisa freezes up when it comes time for her to take the exam. Meanwhile, Homer must avoid accidents at all costs when he is late with an insurance payment.

programme.title: The Simpsons: No Loan Again, Naturally
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge's mortgage skyrockets and they are forced to put their house up for sale, Flanders does a good deed by outbidding Mr. Burns and purchasing the property. But Homer's accusations soon cause their 'landlord' to threaten eviction.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Maggie Gone
programme.desc: When Homer leaves Maggie on the doorstep of a convent to keep her safe while rescuing Santa's Little Helper, the nuns at the convent take Maggie in. Lisa comes up with a plan to infiltrate the convent and rescue Maggie.

programme.title: The Simpsons: In the Name of the Grandfather
programme.desc: The Simpson family travels to Ireland so Grandpa can have one last pint at his beloved O'Flanagan's Pub in Dunkilderry. After a few spirits, Homer and Grandpa buy the establishment from the owner and try to bring it back to life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Wedding for Disaster
programme.desc: When their marriage turns out to be invalid, Homer asks Marge for a re-do on their 'I do's'. But when Homer mysteriously disappears just before the wedding, Bart and Lisa go searching for answers.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Eeny Teeny Maya Moe
programme.desc: In an effort to spend more time with Maggie, Homer takes her to Moe's. While at the bar, Moe tells Homer about his new love, Maya, a woman he met on the Internet. But after meeting her in person, Moe has trouble with the fact that she is short.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: When Bart and Milhouse pull off a prank at Springfield Elementary, Milhouse takes the fall and gets suspended from school. As punishment, Homer forces Bart to visit Grampa at his retirement home where he becomes smitten with a volunteer named Jenny.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Father Knows Worst
programme.desc: When Homer observes Bart and Lisa struggling in certain aspects of their academic and social lives at school, he becomes a proponent of 'helicopter parenting,' the process of closely monitoring a child and forcing them to succeed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Waverly Hills, 9021-D'Oh
programme.desc: When Marge learns Springfield Elementary is the worst school in the state, she and Homer rent an apartment in an upscale neighbourhood so Bart and Lisa can attend a better school. To boost Lisa's popularity, Bart tells everyone she's friends with a star.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa visit the nail salon where they engage in a spirited debate as to whether a woman can be smart, powerful and beautiful all at the same time. To prove their point, they spin four tales of famous women starring familiar Springfield faces.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Coming to Homerica
programme.desc: When Springfield receives an influx of unemployed workers from neighbouring Ogdenville, Mayor Quimby decides to close its borders and Homer sets up a border patrol group.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Whopper
programme.desc: Comic Book Guy casts Homer as the lead in 'Everyman,' a feature film based on a superhero who possesses the ability to take on the powers of every superhero in every comic he touches. Unfortunately, the studio hires a trainer to whip Homer into shape.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets a 'Z'
programme.desc: When Mrs. Krabappel confiscates the students' cellphones, Bart leads an organized effort to stop her by spiking her coffee and watching her make a drunken fool of herself. Principal Skinner fires her and replaces her with a cool new teacher.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Wife Hope
programme.desc: The men and boys of Springfield become obsessed with Mixed Martial Arts, a sport where fighters inflict severe pain on one another. When Marge and her friends stage a protest, the show's promoter embraces the controversy and challenges Marge to a match.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Devil Wears Nada
programme.desc: In an effort to raise money for charity, Marge and 'Philanthro-Chicks' decide to pose for a calendar. At the photo studio, Marge is reluctant to reveal skin, but the photographer loosens her up with wine and, before long, Marge is the talk of the town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pranks and Greens
programme.desc: Fed up with Bart's constant pranks, Principal Skinner tells Bart that there is a former Springfield Elementary student hailed as the best prankster ever. Bart tracks down the prankster and they become fast friends until Bart gets him a job.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rednecks and Broomsticks
programme.desc: After getting lost in a game of hide-and-seek, Lisa wanders into the field and discovers three teenage girls who are practicing Wiccans. Just before Lisa joins them, Chief Wiggum arrests the three girls for witchcraft and Lisa becomes the trial witness.

programme.title: The Simpsons: O Brother, Where Bart Thou
programme.desc: One snowy day in Springfield, Lisa informs Bart that she and Maggie share a bond that Bart will never understand because he doesn't have a brother, so Bart asks Homer for a baby brother. When Homer turns him down, Bart heads to the orphanage.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thursdays With Abie
programme.desc: Grampa is sitting on a bench waiting for his family when a man named Marshall Goldman approaches him and asks to hear about his life. Grampa tells Goldman about the time he was on a battleship, which was hit by an enemy torpedo.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Krusty is approached by two network executives who want to bring in a female co-star to increase the show's female demographic. The rapport between Krusty and Princess Penelope grows, and before long, Krusty proposes to her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Million Dollar Maybe
programme.desc: Homer blows off Marge to buy a lottery ticket and winds up winning the million-dollar jackpot. Fearing how Marge will react if she finds out why Homer missed their date, Homer keeps his newly inherited fortune a secret until Bart finds out.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Boy Meets Curl
programme.desc: The Simpsons head to the 2010 Vancouver Games. Marge and Homer take up curling and end up competing in the Olympic trials. Meanwhile, Lisa becomes hopelessly addicted to collecting Olympic pins.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Color Yellow
programme.desc: Lisa discovers that her Southern ancestors helped a slave, Virgil, escape to freedom and presents her family's story during Black History Month.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Postcards From the Wedge
programme.desc: When Bart fails to turn in his homework, Mrs. Krabappel sends a letter home about Bart's behaviour. Despite Bart's best efforts to intercept it, Homer reads the letter, and he and Marge visit Principal Skinner for a parent-teacher conference.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Stealing First Base
programme.desc: Principal Skinner announces that Mrs. Krabappel was called out of town and budget cuts dictate that, until she returns, the school's two fourth grade classes will merge. Bart reluctantly shares a desk with Nikki and develops a flirtatious rapport.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Greatest Story Ever D'Ohed
programme.desc: When Homer is playing noisily in the yard, it disrupts Flanders' bible study group. Coaxed by the reverend, a frustrated Flanders takes it upon himself to redeem Homer by inviting the Simpson family on his church retreat to Jerusalem.

programme.title: The Simpsons: American History X-cellent
programme.desc: When the police are called to diffuse a rowdy crowd at Mr. Burns' estate, one of the officers recognizes priceless stolen paintings on the walls, and the maniacal billionaire is taken downtown for questioning.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Chief of Hearts
programme.desc: Homer is completing his court-ordered community service when he befriends his supervisor, Chief Wiggum, by offering him a sandwich. Touched by the act of kindness, Wiggum assigns the other convicts unpleasant tasks, but allows Homer to join him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Squirt and the Whale
programme.desc: The Simpsons decide to embrace a cheaper, alternate source of energy by erecting a wind turbine in their backyard. When Homer realizes that some of the power is being directed to the local electric company, he decides to remove his home from the grid.

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Surveil, With Love
programme.desc: A bomb squad mistakenly blows up Homer's unattended gym bag, releasing radiation into the city, and authorities react by suspending civil liberties. Wiggum and his men install surveillance cameras around Springfield and round up suspected terrorists.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Letter Blues
programme.desc: As Mother's Day approaches, Moe narrates an episode in which he writes a letter to Homer, Apu and Reverend Lovejoy, who are vacationing with their children, and threatens to run away with one of their wives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Bob Next Door
programme.desc: Bart becomes convinced that his new neighbour, Walt, is his archenemy Sideshow Bob disguised and back for revenge. But when Marge tries to convince Bart otherwise by taking him to visit the state penitentiary, a disturbing truth is revealed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Judge Me Tender
programme.desc: When Moe discovers a hidden talent for judging contests, he is approached by a television agent to join the 'American Idol' judges' panel. Moe flies to Los Angeles where he tours the Fox lot and receives some sage career advice.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: When Krusty the Clown is announced as the recipient of the Nobel Peace Prize, Homer invites Bart to accompany him on a trip to Oslo for the ceremony. Sensing that Lisa would feel left out, Marge surprises her with a retreat at performing arts camp.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Loan-a-Lisa
programme.desc: Grampa gives each member of the family a portion of his savings. Lisa invests in Nelson's new business venture, but realizes that his instant success might lure him away from the classroom.

programme.title: The Simpsons: MoneyBart
programme.desc: A visit by a Springfield Elementary alum-turned-Ivy-League student pushes Lisa to question her own go-getter attitude and re-evaluate the scope of her extracurricular activities.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXI
programme.desc: Marge, worried about the effects of excessively violent video games, encourages Bart and Milhouse to give wholesome, classic board games a shot. Then, Lisa likes a boy who happens to be a vampire.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Simpson, This Isn't Your Life
programme.desc: When the Simpsons visit Marge's childhood home and discover a box of her old belongings, Lisa is surprised to learn that Marge was once a stellar A+ student. Meanwhile, Bart puts Nelson and his bullying ways in place and claims the title of School Bully.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Daleks in Manhattan
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands in 1930s New York. In the midst of the Depression, people are disappearing off the streets. Meanwhile, at the very top of the Empire State Building, the Doctor's oldest enemies are at work, plotting their largest scheme yet.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Evolution of the Daleks
programme.desc: Dalek Sec is reborn in human form and plans to build a Dalek empire in 1930s New York. While Martha fights for her life at the top of the Empire State Building, the Doctor must enter into an unholy alliance in order to change Dalek history forever.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Human Nature
programme.desc: The Doctor becomes John Smith, a human schoolteacher, to hide from alien villains in 1913 England.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Family of Blood
programme.desc: War breaks out in 1913 as aliens hunt for the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Blink
programme.desc: A young woman finds cryptic messages from 1969 coming from a stranger called the Doctor when people start disappearing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Macra Terror
programme.desc: A Time Lord known as the Doctor uses the TARDIS to aid others throughout time and space.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Lost Episode
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions encounter villains as they travel through time and space.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Sound of Drums
programme.desc: Harold Saxon becomes Prime Minister of Britain and his reign of terror begins. The Doctor, Martha, and Jack begin to unravel his true identity and a plot to destroy the Earth that stretches to the end of time.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Last of the Time Lords
programme.desc: All hope seems lost as Earth has been conquered by the Master and his strange army. The Doctor remains his prisoner, so Martha alone must save the world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Voyage of the Damned
programme.desc: The TARDIS collides with a spacecraft replica of the Titanic and the Doctor must make a stand against a race of android angels.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Next Doctor
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in 1851 and Cybermen stalk the snow of Victorian London. When the Doctor arrives and starts to investigate a spate of mysterious deaths, he's surprised to meet another Doctor, with his own sonic screwdriver and cockney assistant.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Donna Noble battles Miss Foster and her hordes of Adipose to find the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Ood
programme.desc: The Doctor takes Donna to her first alien world. There they uncover some terrible truths about the Human Race.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Sontaran Stratagem
programme.desc: Martha Jones summons the Doctor back to modern-day Earth, but an old enemy lies in wait. With the mysterious ATMOS devices spreading across the world, Donna discovers that even her own family is not safe from the alien threat.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Poison Sky
programme.desc: The Sontarans activate their master plan and begin to choke the whole of planet Earth. UNIT is left defenceless, with a traitor in their ranks. As interplanetary war edges closer, the Doctor has to fight to keep Martha and Donna alive.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Doctor's Daughter
programme.desc: The Doctor arrives on the distant planet Messaline, in the middle of an endless war. But as General Cobb threatens genocide, and Martha is kidnapped by the Hath, the Doctor faces an even greater battle.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Unicorn and the Wasp
programme.desc: The Doctor and Donna travel back to 1926 on the day before Agatha Christie goes missing for 10 days. They join forces with the famous novelist after encountering a body in the library.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Silence in the Library
programme.desc: After landing in an abandoned library in the 51st century, the Doctor, Donna and a team of archaeologists face a swarm of flesh-eating creatures that are seen only as shadows.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Forest of the Dead
programme.desc: As the shadows rise, the Doctor forges an alliance with the mysterious River Song. While the Doctor discovers secrets and revelations about his own future, the sinister Nodes declare that Donna is doomed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Midnight
programme.desc: The Doctor is trapped and powerless on the planet Midnight. A woman called Sky seems to hold the answers he needs, but paranoia takes hold of the Doctor and Sky turns his strengths against him.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Joseph Gordon-Levitt
programme.desc: Actor Joseph Gordon-Levitt tackles Kenya's unyielding terrain with Bear Grylls. After dropping in from a helicopter, the two navigate a perilous rappel, milk a camel for needed hydration and ascend a rock dome that tests Joseph's fear of heights.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Dave Bautista in Glen Canyon, Arizona
programme.desc: Bear Grylls and former WWE world champion Dave Bautista adventure through the Arizona desert.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a journey through New England's White Mountains. After being dropped from a helicopter, Don and Bear use a deer antler to cross a raging river, rappel a massive cliff and attempt a climb to the top of a railroad bridge.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Brie Larson in the Pearl Islands
programme.desc: Brie Larson accompanies Bear on a jungle adventure across a remote island in the Gulf of Panama.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Channing Tatum in the Mountains of Norway
programme.desc: Bear Grylls puts Channing Tatum’s survival skills to the test in the wilds of Norway.

programme.title: Movie: Free Solo
programme.desc: Alex Honnold, the world’s most accomplished free soloist climber, prepares mentally and physically for his most daring adventure to date: scaling the 3200-foot El Capitan in Yosemite without a rope or safety gear.

programme.title: Movie: Free Solo
programme.desc: Alex Honnold, the world’s most accomplished free soloist climber, prepares mentally and physically for his most daring adventure to date: scaling the 3200-foot El Capitan in Yosemite without a rope or safety gear.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Game of Fins
programme.desc: It’s week two of fishing and a familiar boat enters the fleet, igniting old rivalries.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wreck It Ralph
programme.desc: A familiar face returns to Gloucester to compete for the title of top bluefin fisherman.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: 'Gods and Monstahs'
programme.desc: Bad luck strikes the fleet and the captains struggle to turn their fortunes around.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Relative Madness
programme.desc: Captain Dave Marciano’s nephew and first mate Jay brings a shot of energy to the Falcon.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Attack of the Pack
programme.desc: An unexpected crowd of boats challenges the captains to find new spots for Bluefin.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Double Team
programme.desc: The captains form alliances to better their chances of putting meat on deck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wicked Waves
programme.desc: Stormy weather hits, and one captain brings in a payday that shakes up the leaderboard.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: I Love Moo!
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Grub-a-Dub-Dub
programme.desc: This week on The Incredible Dr. Pol, there’s trauma, drama and a piglet in peril.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: May the Horse Be With You
programme.desc: Constipated cats and grassy horses come through the clinic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: New Cats on the Block
programme.desc: The clinic is busy with poisoned pups, sassy cats, and new feline neighbours.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol'r Plunge
programme.desc: Dr. Pol braves the icy cold water like a polar bear for charity.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: 9 Cows a Milking
programme.desc: It is the holiday season in Michigan and Dr. Pol and his team make their patient list, check it twice, and treat those who are naughty, spotty, snotty, and nice!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Baby, It's Cold Outside
programme.desc: A Great Dane is adopted.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol'r Plunge
programme.desc: Dr. Pol braves the icy cold water like a polar bear for charity.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: 9 Cows a Milking
programme.desc: It is the holiday season in Michigan and Dr. Pol and his team make their patient list, check it twice, and treat those who are naughty, spotty, snotty, and nice!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Beginner's Yuck
programme.desc: The Pol Clinic veterans take a new vet, Dr. Erin, under their wing, as they flip cows, clamp calves, tube horses, and treat a rescue rooster with an injured foot.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Calf Out Loud
programme.desc: Whether Doc Pol is wrestling a bull, dodging the beaks of angry birds, or getting spit on by crotchety alpacas, it's a job filled with stressful situations, weird smells and even weirder personalities. Soemtimes all you can do is laugh.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Itchin' for a Stitchin'
programme.desc: In this enhanced episode, it's high stakes for Doc and the PVS staff as animals find themselves in one complication after the next.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: It’s All Dutch To Me
programme.desc: There's no place like the homeland. Dr. Pol, Diane, and Charles finally embark on a long overdue trip to the Netherlands.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Show Me the Honey
programme.desc: Vet Assistant, Katie, shadows Dr. Pol in hopes of getting into veterinarian school.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Cow Jumped Over the Moon
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and Diane are convinced the full moon has caused some unpredictable animal behaviour, as well as several emergencies at the clinic, but Charles isn't so sure.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Line and Lemur
programme.desc: Summer's coming to an end, but Dr. Pol's clients are still rushing in!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Bark 'n Stormy
programme.desc: It's going to be a barking good time this week.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Twitch in Time
programme.desc: Emergencies don't follow business hours. Doctors work 24/7.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Kung Fu Biting
programme.desc: The docs must help four dogs who've been attacked.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: You Can't Handle the Tooth
programme.desc: Dr. Michele shadows the regulars.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Chicago's Tower of Terror
programme.desc: When the innovative design of an iconic Chicago skyscraper leads to tragedy, experts must apply cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering methods to fix an urgent, life-or-death problem.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Plague City
programme.desc: A village on a remote island was once home to the victims of deadly disease, but today, the island and its buildings are abandoned. Experts investigate what went wrong in this strange place and what happened to the people who once lived here.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Cave to Hell
programme.desc: When a sinister cave is discovered in a remote corner of Iceland, experts uncover a secret underworld tunneling to unknown depths, and using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if this strange place could hold secrets of alien worlds.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Medusa
programme.desc: Experts investigate a strange glowing lake reported to turn things into stone. A mysterious structure in Africa that resembles Stonehenge is said to be the resting place of a mythical giant. A dark conspiracy could be at work in the Australian outback.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of Blood
programme.desc: An ancient man-made volcano might reveal buried treasure and bloody human sacrifice. When NASA discovers a strange pattern in the Arctic ice, experts investigate if it has alien origins. A mystery in the Sahara might have a sinister explanation.

programme.title: Crime 360: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: Det. Mocello responds to the scene of a suspicious fire in the bedroom of a first-floor apartment. He soon discovers that the deceased victim's charred body has sustained serious trauma.

programme.title: Crime 360: Final Call
programme.desc: Homicide detectives Thompson and Pence are called out to a bloody crime scene. A local tenant knows the victim, but claims to have no knowledge of the murder.

programme.title: City Confidential: Carlsbad: Danger in the Desert
programme.desc: Johnny Volpato, a popular politician and pharmacist, was accused of shooting his wife.

programme.title: American Justice: Cops on Trial
programme.desc: Police officers and the general public are held to different standards of justice.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dark Side of the City

programme.title: Nightwatch: Always Remain Calm
programme.desc: Tampa first responders have a chaotic night treating seizure and overdose patients; the ROC Squad Task Force tracks down suspected armed robbers in a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Cursed
programme.desc: After grappling with one mishap after another, Tom seeks the help of a voodoo priestess to see if she can cure him.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bayou Biker Thieves
programme.desc: An organized ring of motorcycle thieves has been striking every six months, stealing hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of motorcycles in a single night.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bourgeois' Last Stand
programme.desc: Sheriff Vernon Bourgeois is weeks away from retiring, but he determines to take down a major copper theft ring that's been terrorizing his parish.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bourgeois' Last Stand
programme.desc: Sheriff Vernon Bourgeois is weeks away from retiring, but he determines to take down a major copper theft ring that's been terrorizing his parish.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Full Moon Madness
programme.desc: Detectives try to track down a gang of thieves that are preying on empty camps in the deep bayou.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Hunt for the Swamp Monster
programme.desc: Sgt. Authement gets a call about a disturbance on a shrimping vessel, and calls in the SWAT team when he learns the captain has taken a deckhand hostage.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: The Informant
programme.desc: An inmate risks his life and turns informant to help Sergeant Hampton and Special Agent John Fisher eliminate the inmates' outside drug source.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A case that involves cocaine, morphine and a strange love triangle leads the Squad into the community for a street bust.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boom Town
programme.desc: A new family learns how tight-knit their new community is when a slight against one turns the entire street against them leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: All News Is Local
programme.desc: In August 2000, 19-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. Local reporters and family members tell the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: I Will Find You
programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Winter's Nightmare
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, Jaqueline and Vanderlei Szczepanik vanish from Omaha, Nebraska with their young son.

programme.title: The Interrogator: You Know What Time It Is
programme.desc: A mother of two is shot to death outside her apartment complex just minutes after returning home from her 30th birthday celebration. After interviewing multiple witnesses and suspects, Detective Fil Waters uncovers a shocking lead caught on video.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Way Out
programme.desc: An investigation into the missing persons case of 13-year-old Jessyca Mullenberg.

programme.title: Winter's Nightmare
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, Jaqueline and Vanderlei Szczepanik vanish from Omaha, Nebraska with their young son.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Way Out

programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Cornered
programme.desc: In the spring of 2003, 37 year old single mother Karen Richardt has a chance meeting with her Brooklyn neighbor Carlito Perez. But when Karen tries to distance herself, no one could have predicted the deadly cycle of violence he would unleash.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Exposed
programme.desc: When young professional Hannah moves into the house of her dreams, her privacy is shattered after a mysterious man begins filming her through her window. As his obsessive and threatening behavior escalates, she gambles on a violent confrontation.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: Everything is looking up for 27 year old Kisha Kelly after she buys her first home in Dallas, Texas. But within days of moving in, she encounters the former owner of the property and immediately realizes he's taken on a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Devil in the Pews
programme.desc: While 18-year-old Jennifer is recovering from a brain tumor, she's visited by a member of her congregation, reformed ex-con Bill. But her gratitude soon turns to fear as it becomes obvious Bill wants to keep Jennifer as his own -- forever.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: A Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: When maternal senior psychiatric nurse Maria Jordan fires erratic, heroin-addicted junior nurse Denis Czajkowski, it triggers an all-consuming obsession with Maria that culminates in him holding her hostage for an unimaginably bloody 48 hours.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Multiple Personalities
programme.desc: When New York attorney Marc successfully defends a client, he has no idea that her gratitude will soon become a nightmare. As a talented impersonator, Marc's ex-client causes chaos and suffering in a terrifying mission to win his affection.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Screams in the Desert
programme.desc: Judie starts to date an attractive, caring man called Mike but has no idea that he is utterly obsessed with her, and will stop at nothing until he has her all to himself. After years of mental torture, death threats and stalking Judie fights back.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Mad for Teacher
programme.desc: Linda, a special ed teacher, has taught Todd for years. Now 17 with learning problems and a temper, Todd only wants Linda to teach him. Torn between helping him and protecting herself, Linda's world turns upside down when Todd's obsession comes knocking.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Love in Flames
programme.desc: Family tragedies send a couple's dream of a perfect life up in flames.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death in Vegas
programme.desc: John and Evie Watson manage to bridge the gap between their ages, cultures and languages. But after more than a quarter century of marriage-the pillars of their love have crumbled to pieces causing tempers to flare and secrets to be uncovered.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death in the Family
programme.desc: Kraig and Karen Kahler enjoyed a life of influence and privilege, but sexual obsession spun out of control and destroyed everything.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: While You Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Wangler and his wife Kathy appear to be living the middle-class dream: two sons, financial security, and a strong faith. But on September 4th, 2006, their façade falls down around them as a cold pre-meditated execution tears their family apart.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Seth Bullock: Sheriff of Deadwood
programme.desc: In Deadwood, a mining camp swirling with violence and vice, Seth Bullock is the only stabilizing force standing in the way of utter chaos.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: The Battle of Italy
programme.desc: In 1943, tanks of the Canadian Armoured Corps make their combat debut on the European mainland. This is the story of the Canadian tankers who fight their way up the Italian peninsula in the push to liberate Rome from Nazi occupation.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: The Battle of France
programme.desc: At the outset of WWII, the Germans pioneer a new form of mobile armoured warfare. This is the story of the famed Nazi Blitzkrieg, as thousands of panzers burst through terrain thought impassible to conquer Western Europe in a matter of weeks.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Tales of Sea and Sky

programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Glasshouse Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete treks to New York's Catskill Mountains to build an NTS first - a glasshouse in the sky. Piecing materials together like a puzzle, Pete uses his clients' collection of 50 vintage windows to construct an elegant treehouse encased by walls of glass.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Hill Country Hideout
programme.desc: Pete and his gang ride out to the Lone Star State to build a double-decker hideout in Texas Hill Country. Six live oak trees are used to create rustic perfection with a saloon-style first floor for sippin' sarsaparilla and a glass floor for views below.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rustic English Re-tree-t
programme.desc: Pete and his team embark on a quest to an idyllic farm in Waxhaw, NC with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen. But one thing might stand in the way of Pete and his holy grail of pastoral treehouse builds, goats!

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Frank Lloyd Lakehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew channel Frank Lloyd Wright for a triple-decker treehouse on the shores of Lake Barkley in Kentucky.
