programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Man Who Talked to Dogs
programme.desc: Celebrity dog trainer Mark Stover and his wife, Linda, built a thriving business and a beautiful home but their dream life didn't last. An affair led to a bitter divorce. Then Mark vanished in a mystery with the makings of a Hollywood thriller.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Plot Twist
programme.desc: For a group of stage actors, life seemed to be imitating art in the worst way when a young college student was killed. Police believed they knew who was responsible, but this mystery had a grand finale no one saw coming.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deep in the Woods
programme.desc: Kelli Bordeaux was just starting what she hoped to be a long career in the military, but fate had other plans. When she vanished, friends and family launched a frantic search, but it was stranger hell-bent on justice who uncovered the ugly truth.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bondurants
programme.desc: A pair of larger than life identical twins commit a series of brutal attacks in a small Tennessee town. With each crime, the brothers grow more emboldened. As time goes on and with little evidence against them, there's no telling how far they'll go.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Brileys
programme.desc: Over a brutal 7-month stretch, a trio of brothers commit a series of increasingly violent crimes across the city of Richmond, leaving behind a growing body count. Even after their apprehension, these brothers prove difficult to contain.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Lewis and Machuca
programme.desc: In the summer of 1991, a pair of half-siblings creates panic across southern California when they embark on a spree of random crimes of the worst kind, targeting people out doing everyday tasks.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rosas
programme.desc: After a man is found brutally murdered inside his own bar a murder mystery unfolds over the span of years. Detectives believe it's a business deal gone bad and must remain steadfastly dedicated to the case after hitting several dead ends.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Carrs
programme.desc: The Carr brothers arrive in Wichita intending to commit robberies, but their plans quickly escalate to a murderous spree the likes of which Kansas had never seen. The reign of terror by the brothers is later known as the 'Wichita Massacre.'

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bevers
programme.desc: Sheltered teen brothers Robert and Michael Bever idolized serial killers and dreamed of being the most prolific murderers in history. With an arsenal of weapons, their plan for notoriety begins at home in their quiet Oklahoma suburb.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Williams
programme.desc: Raised in a strict home, sheltered from the outside world, Matthew and Tyler believe it's their duty to cleanse the world of those living in sin. When two men are found dead the brother's connection to them points toward a hateful trail of crime.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Stovalls
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Gustafsons
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Judy Carlson lived in a painful limbo. Her son disappeared without a trace. Years went by and she may never have known his fate if not for a rookie detective’s dogged work but to solve this cold case, the investigator also need the help of a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Who Killed the Radio Star
programme.desc: Steven B. Williams was a DJ with a golden voice. Then he vanished. It was a mystery that stretched from California to Montana. The clue to it all was wrapped in napkin tucked in a cabinet hidden in a library.

programme.title: Snapped: Behind Bars: Sheila Davalloo
programme.desc: The only convicted murderer featured on 'Snapped' twice, Davalloo tells her story in an exclusive prison interview. We look back at the crimes that put her behind bars, reveal more details from her past, and examine a possible connection to a cold case.

programme.title: The Piketon Family Murders
programme.desc: In rural Piketon, Ohio a family of 8 is murdered execution style across four different properties. As police investigate the attack, word of the brutal murders sends shockwaves through the community and destroys the lives of two families.

programme.title: Snapped: Sandy Locklear
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved widower leaves police wondering what secrets his marriage, to his much younger new wife, might be hiding.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Paet
programme.desc: An Air Force sergeant is gunned down in his garage revealing an elaborate conspiracy with an unlikely mastermind.

programme.title: Snapped: Laura Stelmasek
programme.desc: Police must unravel a mystery involving an Arizona couple, cross-country romance and a deadly plan.

programme.title: Snapped: Dawson McGehee
programme.desc: Halloween becomes a real-life horror story when police discover a beloved mother of four murdered. The panic intensifies as the investigation turns into a case populated by demons, masks and a potential psychopath on the loose.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fool Monty
programme.desc: Mr. Burns is distraught at the less-than-sensitive response to his news that he has only weeks to live. When he ends up at the Simpson's home, Marge and Homer decide it's payback time, while Lisa stands up for the old man.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Munched Is That Birdie in the Window?
programme.desc: When a pigeon flies through the Simpsons' home and suffers a broken wing, Bart makes it his duty to care for the bird and nurse it back to health. When the pigeon is ready to fly, Homer decides to enter it in a bird race.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Disappointed that she is spreading holiday cheer alone, Marge sends a letter to Martha Stewart to ask for her help to save the family's Christmas. Martha comes to the rescue and transforms the house into the North Pole chalet Marge has always dreamed of.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Donnie Fatso
programme.desc: Homer spends New Year's Eve in the Springfield Penitentiary after getting caught bribing an official. An FBI investigator offers to reduce his jail time if Homer agrees to go undercover as an informant to investigate Fat Tony.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moms I'd Like to Forget
programme.desc: During a game of dodgeball, Bart discovers that a classmate has the same scar on his hand that he does. Puzzled by the matching blemishes, he asks Marge about it, who explains that she and her girlfriends formed 'The Cool Moms' club years earlier.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Flaming Moe
programme.desc: When Smithers offers to help transform Moe's dingy pub into a more refined and trendy lounge, the revamped Mo's quickly becomes Springfield's local gay hangout.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Father
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with a 1980s family sitcom and models his parenting skills after the show's sensible father, much to Bart's chagrin.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Blue and the Gray
programme.desc: After spending another Valentine's Day alone, Moe attends a seminar to gain more confidence with women. Moe takes the doctor's advice and asks Homer to be his wingman, but then becomes distraught when women are drawn to Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Angry Dad: The Movie
programme.desc: Bart's cartoon about an angry dad is turned into a movie and quickly becomes a critics' favourite. When Russell Brand presents the Golden Globe to Bart's film, Homer usurps the podium and gives his own acceptance speech.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Scorpion's Tale
programme.desc: At a field trip, Lisa discovers that desert water mysteriously makes combative creatures get along, so she brings some of the water home as a souvenir. When Grampa moves in, Homer secretly tests the desert water on Grampa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Midsummer's Nice Dream
programme.desc: The town is abuzz when Cheech and Chong announce a Springfield stop on their much-anticipated reunion tour. When Chong is unable to perform, Homer steps in and delivers all the jokes by heart. Impressed, Cheech invites Homer to go on tour with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is a Many Strangled Thing
programme.desc: When Homer inadvertently humiliates Bart in front of a stadium crowd, Marge encourages Homer to enroll in a fathering enrichment class taught by therapist Dr. Zander.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Simpsina
programme.desc: Lisa becomes a magician's apprentice to the legendary Great Raymondo, who helps her develop her craft. A schoolgirl crush clouds her judgment when she is coaxed into revealing the Great Raymondo's most famous magic trick to his phony arch nemesis.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Real Housewives of Fat Tony
programme.desc: Fat Tony and Selma are in love and get married after a whirlwind courtship. To ease Marge's reservations about the marriage, Fat Tony invites Homer and Marge to a weekend getaway at the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Scissorhands
programme.desc: When Homer discovers a genius talent for styling hair and opens his own salon, he becomes Springfield's most in-demand hair stylist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 500 Keys
programme.desc: When the Simpsons discover a collection of keys, which open every door in Springfield, Lisa stumbles upon an eerie hidden classroom beneath Springfield Elementary School.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ned-Liest Catch
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for getting Mrs. Krabappel suspended after one of his school pranks, Bart helps her escape detention, and Ned Flanders winds up saving her life in the process.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Falcon and the D'Ohman
programme.desc: Homer befriends a reserved security guard recently hired by the nuclear power plant. Plagued by violent flashbacks from his past as a CIA agent, he must overcome his tortured nightmares to save Homer from a Ukrainian terrorist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Stops to Smell the Roosevelts
programme.desc: Principal Skinner challenges superintendent Gary Chalmers to take over Bart's education after one of Bart's pranks leads to a school fundraiser debacle.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII
programme.desc: Homer takes a dangerous dive into an isolated canyon on Candy Peak, but when a crashing boulder traps his arm, he channels the spirit of Aron Ralston to save himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Replaceable You
programme.desc: Bart's science fair project, a mechanical baby seal, outshines Lisa's asteroid model and becomes a popular pet among the retirement home patrons.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Food Wife
programme.desc: Marge takes Bart and Lisa on a weekend excursion and when an unexpected restaurant detour awakens their taste buds, fellow foodies inspire them to start a food blog.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Book Job
programme.desc: Lisa becomes disheartened when she learns the shocking truth behind the 'tween lit' industry and her beloved fantasy novel characters, but Homer decides to cash in on the craze and forms a team to group-write the next 'tween lit' hit.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man in Blue Flannel Pants
programme.desc: The Simpsons host a tastemaker party at their home to promote Absolut Krusty, Krusty the Clown's own brand of liquor. Mr. Burns takes notice of the party's success and decides to promote Homer to 'Account Man' for the Springfield Nuclear Plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ten-Per-Cent Solution
programme.desc: Krusty the Clown gets stuck in a rut when the television network pulls his show and his talent agency drops him. When the Simpsons introduce him to an agent, they're surprised to learn she was Krusty's first-ever agent.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Holidays of Future Passed
programme.desc: The Simpsons flash forward 30 years and find themselves in a tech-savvy, futuristic Springfield. Bart and Lisa have children of their own and decide to spend the holidays as one big family at Homer and Marge's house.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Politically Inept With Homer Simpson
programme.desc: Homer lands his own political talk show after a video featuring his impassioned rant on poor treatment at the airport goes viral. As his talk show quickly gains popularity nationwide, Homer becomes the spokesperson for the Gravy Movement.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The D'oh-cial Network
programme.desc: As the mastermind behind the online social networking phenomenon 'SpringFace,' Lisa is called to trial when Springfield's obsession with the site becomes chaotic and dysfunctional.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Goes From Rags to Riches
programme.desc: After Moe is heckled for not having any real companions, Moe's best friend and beloved bar rag narrates his incredible 1,000-year journey to Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Daughter Also Rises
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa's mother-daughter Valentine's Day plans change when Lisa meets an intellectual romantic who shares her passion for culture, history and literature.

programme.title: The Simpsons: At Long Last Leave
programme.desc: When the Simpsons are evicted from Springfield, they join an off-the-grid community outside of town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Exit Through the Kwik-E-Mart
programme.desc: In order to get even with his dad, Bart goes undercover as a street graffiti artist and plasters Homer's unflattering image all over Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How I Wet Your Mother
programme.desc: Karma gets the best of Homer after he gets his friends in trouble, and as a result, his bedwetting problem worsens. The family tries to infiltrate his dreams to search for clues in his subconscious to determine the source of his problem.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Them, Robot
programme.desc: Mr. Burns replaces the Springfield Power Plant's employees with robots, but decides to keep Homer as the sole human worker.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Beware My Cheating Bart
programme.desc: When Bart is forced to chaperone Jimbo's girlfriend at a movie, she ends up developing feelings for him, resulting in a whole bunch of trouble with the bullies at school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Totally Fun Thing Bart Will Never Do Again
programme.desc: When Bart sees a commercial for the ultimate cruise, he begs his parents for a family vacation. Low on cash, the only way they can go is if each family member sells one valuable item.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Spy Who Learned Me
programme.desc: Marge becomes upset when Homer blurts out embarrassing remarks throughout a movie. After Homer suffers a concussion on the job, he seeks help during his time off to learn how to become a better husband.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Ned 'N' Edna's Blend
programme.desc: When the town of Springfield learns that Ned and Edna secretly got hitched, Marge offers to throw them a congratulatory reception.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Goes Gaga
programme.desc: Lisa tries to reverse her status as one of the least popular girls in school by ghostwriting positive things about herself on the school blog.

programme.title: The Longest Daycare
programme.desc: Maggie Simpson spends the day in the Ayn Rand School for Tots.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moonshine River
programme.desc: The family travels to New York City in search of Bart's long-lost love who he wants to reconnect with. Lisa and Marge look forward to the trip and settle for the free 'Shakespeare In the Park,' which doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIII
programme.desc: A Mayan Homer and Marge are witnesses to the prediction that 2012 will be the end of the world, the Springfield Subatomic Supercollider creates a black hole that terrorizes the city and Bart travels back in time to 1974.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Adventures in Baby Getting
programme.desc: When Marge's car falls into a sink hole, she buys the perfect replacement. However, she grows to hate it since, as she tells a shocked Homer, it would be too small if she wanted to have another baby.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Abie Gone
programme.desc: When Grampa escapes from his retirement home, Homer and Marge frantically try to track him down by following clues that reveal secrets in Grampa's past.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Penny Wiseguys
programme.desc: Homer is shocked to discover that his bowling teammate is an accountant for Fat Tony.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Tree Grows in Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa tries to cheer up a down-in-the-dumps Homer by winning him a 'MyPad' at the school auction. But he falls back into a funk when he breaks the magical tablet device.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer wants a younger, hipper image, so he starts hanging out with Terrence and Emily - his cool new neighbours from Portland, Oregon, but Marge finds their trendy parenting methods extreme.

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Cur With Love
programme.desc: When a fire at the retirement home forces Grampa to move home with the Simpsons, Homer throws out his back on moving day and decides to stay home to recover.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Goes to Prep School
programme.desc: Homer joins the 'Springfield Preppers,' an off-the-grid survivalist group whose leader has set up a top-secret retreat outside of town to prepare for the end of the world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Midnight
programme.desc: The Doctor is trapped and powerless on the planet Midnight. A woman called Sky seems to hold the answers he needs, but paranoia takes hold of the Doctor and Sky turns his strengths against him.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Turn Left
programme.desc: Donna's entire world collapses but there is no sign of the Doctor. Instead, she finds help from a mysterious blond woman. As Donna and Rose Tyler combine forces, they may be too late to save the whole of creation from approaching darkness.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Stolen Earth
programme.desc: In the Doctor's absence, Harriet Jones assembles a secret army of Earth's greatest heroes to fight the Dalek Empire.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Journey's End
programme.desc: The Doctor is defenceless as the Daleks activate their master plan. The secret army sets out to battle Davros, knowing that it is prophesied that one of them will die.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Dead
programme.desc: The Doctor finds himself and those around him in serious danger after a strange bus ride.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Waters of Mars
programme.desc: The Doctor helps combat a crisis from beneath Mars' surface.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham's guests include John Boyega, Daisy Ridley, Henry Cavill, Ruth Jones, Rob Brydon and Robbie Williams.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Stolen Earth
programme.desc: In the Doctor's absence, Harriet Jones assembles a secret army of Earth's greatest heroes to fight the Dalek Empire.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Journey's End
programme.desc: The Doctor is defenceless as the Daleks activate their master plan. The secret army sets out to battle Davros, knowing that it is prophesied that one of them will die.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Eleventh Hour
programme.desc: A brand-new Doctor crashes to Earth with no time to ponder his new face and personality - he must save humanity from an alien threat. The Doctor also meets his new companion, Amy Pond, and she's been waiting for him a very long time.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Beast Below
programme.desc: The Doctor and Amy travel to Britain of the far-off future, where people live in a giant spaceship. The Doctor encounters someone who knew one of his previous incarnations, and Amy comes across the terrifying Smilers and an awful secret.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Victory of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor and Amy arrive in one of the most important eras of Britain's past - World War Two. In a secret room beneath London, the infamous alien villains, the Daleks, are dreaming up a deadly plot.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time of Angels
programme.desc: Trouble arrives when River Song returns to the Doctor's life. The last of the Weeping Angels is loose and the Doctor must track it down. Amy is warned not to blink but it may not be the right advice.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Flesh and Stone
programme.desc: Trouble arrives when River Song returns to the Doctor's life. The last of the Weeping Angels is loose and the Doctor must track it down. Amy is warned not to blink but it may not be the right advice.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vampires in Venice
programme.desc: The Doctor takes Amy and Rory away for a romantic break but terror awaits in 16th century Venice. The House of Calvierri protects the city of Venice, but when blood-drained corpses start to show up in the streets, the Doctor suspects the Calvierri.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Amy's Choice
programme.desc: After being going for five years, the Doctor reappears in Amy's life and she is faced with having to make a terrible choice.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Hungry Earth
programme.desc: It's 2015 and scientists are drilling far into the Earth's crust, hoping to make history, but deep below the surface, something is not right.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Cold Blood
programme.desc: The Doctor battles to prevent an all out war between the Silurians and the humans. As a potential apocalypse looms, the Doctor discovers an even more horrifying danger waits for him.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vincent and the Doctor
programme.desc: Amy finds herself battling a deadly alien in France with none other than Vincent Van Gogh.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Lodger
programme.desc: When people begin disappearing in a flat, the Doctor investigates a mysterious staircase in the building that you can walk up, but never down.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Pandorica Opens
programme.desc: The Doctor receives a message from his allies that the Pandorica, which allegedly holds the most fearsome being in the universe, is about to open.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Rory maintains a vigil for Amy while the Doctor is trapped in the Pandorica. The key to restoring the universe may lie with a little girl who still believes in stars.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Impossible Astronaut
programme.desc: The Doctor, Amy and Rory receive a secret summons that leads them to the Oval Office in 1969. Enlisting the help of a former FBI agent and the irrepressible River Song, the Doctor promises to assist the President.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Enemy Within
programme.desc: As the '90s progress, America becomes more divided and fragmented. In Waco, an obscure religious cult becomes a lightning rod for a fear of big government invading our homes.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: In the '90s, new attitudes and new technology equal more freedom, more fragmentation, more diversity, but also more conflict.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibal Death Pit
programme.desc: A strange circular forest is found next to a notorious cannibal site. Then, when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: Finding Atlantis: The New Evidence: Curse of the Lost City
programme.desc: The mystery of Atlantis is one of archaeology's greatest unexplained questions, but today, experts are using cutting-edge technology and the latest science to investigate the secret location of the lost city.

programme.title: Finding Atlantis: The New Evidence: Relics of the Deep
programme.desc: New discoveries have turned up hard evidence of a long-lost city beneath the waves, and using the latest archaeological methods, experts might finally prove if it's the mysterious city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: Finding Atlantis: The New Evidence: Curse of the Lost City
programme.desc: The mystery of Atlantis is one of archaeology's greatest unexplained questions, but today, experts are using cutting-edge technology and the latest science to investigate the secret location of the lost city.

programme.title: Finding Atlantis: The New Evidence: Relics of the Deep
programme.desc: New discoveries have turned up hard evidence of a long-lost city beneath the waves, and using the latest archaeological methods, experts might finally prove if it's the mysterious city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding King Arthur
programme.desc: An abandoned megacity in a remote jungle might be the home of an ancient treasure and a dark secret. When a mysterious circular stone structure is discovered in Scotland, experts investigate whether it's the fabled Round Table of King Arthur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: MythBusters: Driven to Destruction
programme.desc: Adam and Jamie destroy cars in style: one with a vacuum cleaner and the other with a massive amount of C4.

programme.title: MythBusters: The Explosion Special
programme.desc: In their farewell season, Adam and Jamie go out with a bang. They bid farewell to their favourite pastime with two explosive tall tales.

programme.title: MythBusters: Blow It Out the Water
programme.desc: Adam and Jamie blow up a boat with 1,000 pounds of high explosives before building a homemade machine gun from Breaking Bad's season finale.

programme.title: MythBusters: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: The MythBusters tackle some of Hollywood's favourite explosive scenarios. Find out if a hero could really shoot a live grenade in midair and thus render it useless. Also, see if you could really contain a TNT explosion inside a file cabinet or aquarium.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Shanked
programme.desc: An inmate with a shank sticking out of his stomach is rushed to the infirmary. Before losing consciousness, he gives the agents a lead on the case.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Robert/ Montrell
programme.desc: A man suffering from bipolar disorder runs from the police; shots fired as man eludes.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Adam/ Gary

programme.title: Why I Ran: Ron/ Hector
programme.desc: A crack addict pushes his wife to report items he sold for drugs as stolen.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Mad Maks: Maksim Gelman

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Payback: Earl Forrest
programme.desc: Earl Forrest burst into a friend's house and gunned down two people in cold blood. He then ambushed the deputies who came knocking, leaving four more people shot. Forrest reveals the surprising reason behind the killing spree.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: The Shootout

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Finding the Cop Voice

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A man takes cyber-stalking to a whole new level by sending hundreds of threatening messages and posting over 40 videos on social media that document his twisted fixation for a former high school classmate.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love Sick
programme.desc: In 2014, police are called to a lifeless body in a trailer in Winona, Missouri. The owners, Jason and Stephanie McClurg, have suffered a series of misfortunes which have put their marriage under enormous pressure. But nobody expected it to lead to murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Control, Kill, Delete

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Don't Shoot!
programme.desc: In 2015 in Newaygo County, Michigan, Marty and Glenna Duram are found gunned down in their own home. At the heart of the crime is their marriage. It's a bizarre story that involves drugs, stolen money, and a pet parrot who is an eyewitness.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The 22-Year Itch

programme.title: The Councilman and His Nanny

programme.title: Scott Peterson: An American Murder Mystery

programme.title: Body Cam: Up Against the Clock
programme.desc: Police are hunting two suspects, responsible for a string of armed robberies; an undercover cop foils a double murder for hire plot; a known felon tries to force an officer off the road, stopping at nothing to escape arrest.

programme.desc: Police are hunting two suspects, responsible for a string of armed robberies; an undercover cop foils a double murder for hire plot; a known felon tries to force an officer off the road, stopping at nothing to escape arrest.

programme.title: The Councilman and His Nanny
programme.desc: After taking in a young woman in need, Tim and LeeAnn Shannon's relationship is brought to the brink when an affair quickly turns deadly.

programme.title: Dead Silent: When a Stranger Knocks
programme.desc: After fleeing her troubled marriage, Deborah Brown and her kids seek refuge at her brother's house in rustic Lebanon, Maine. But when a stranger shows up in the dead of night seeking help, neither Deborah nor her family are prepared for what happens next.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Secrets of the Santa Cruz Mountains
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Linda Jozavich vanishes from work one night in 1979, it just doesn't make sense to her Santa Cruz community. Years later, the murder of another local teen, Lois Sigala, sends investigators a step closer to solving Linda's case.

programme.title: Dead Silent: A History of Violence
programme.desc: In 1979, a walk in the woods turns out to be a deadly mistake for single mom, Marie Huckins. Twenty years later, her daughter Patricia finds a night out following in the same fateful footsteps.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Welcome to the Devil House
programme.desc: A mansion deep in the Georgia woods is said to house terrible secrets. Everyone in this rural county has heard the rumors, but no one knows the truth ... until a 1982 visit to Corpsewood Manor by a group of young locals turns deadly.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Picture of Evil
programme.desc: A picture-perfect dinner for two dissolves into a nightmare for University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff sophomore and cheerleader Dominique 'Nicky' Hurd and a fellow classmate after they become the targets of a deranged predator.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: In a remote town in Oklahoma, Amanda Burney and her fiancée Ethan Walton are out running an errand that quickly becomes a run for their lives.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murdered in the Cold of Winter
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Stamping Ground, Kentucky, the dead body of a young woman is found late at night by her brother and father. When detectives learn the victim was pregnant, they consider it a motive for murder and begin a homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Stolen Memories
programme.desc: Leaving behind Scranton, Pennsylvania, a woman and her family head for the white sands of Florida to start a new life. When one of them disappears, their dream becomes a nightmare they must live over, and over again.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: A Sister's Loss
programme.desc: In the suburbs of central Ohio, a woman is found stabbed to death in her kitchen after she fails to show up for work. When a family heirloom is discovered during the investigation, the victim's sister is able to help detectives solve the case.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murder in the Wetlands
programme.desc: In the coastal town of Leland, North Carolina, a young mother is found dead in a swamp after she was reported missing just days before. As detectives speak with the victim's friends and family, they begin to unravel the truth behind a horrifying murder.

programme.title: Shattered: In the Shadows of South Hill
programme.desc: In October 1980, one brave woman falls victim to the notorious South Hill rapist. While a desperate detective hunts down the vile attacker, another man has no idea that the suspect they're all looking for has been under his nose the entire time.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Death Certificate
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder, Anthony Ragno goes on the run. Building a new life trafficking pot in the Haitian islands, a coke addiction and close calls with local governments drive Ragno back to the US with a fake name.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through an Air Duct
programme.desc: After killing a man, ex-con Rondell Reed crashes his getaway car and is sent to prison. He and his cellmate escape by squeezing through an air duct. Once free, he steals and carjacks his way north to Ohio where another chase leads to another car crash.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be a Ladies' Man
programme.desc: David Corbin is a career criminal. After a stint in prison, Corbin launches a crime wave, stealing cars and selling them for a profit. But when a jealous girlfriend rats him out, Corbin is caught and sent to prison where he pulls off a daring escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be the 'Green Baron'
programme.desc: Tony Darwin makes millions piloting marijuana into Florida. Even after getting caught, he continues works for a notorious smuggler until a deadly plane crash forces him to flee the country.

programme.desc: Donna Schatz went on the run after carrying out a violent vendetta on her ex-boyfriend.

programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Karate Cub/Don't Over Duet
programme.desc: Fozzie must learn some 'Camilla-rate' in order to join the martial arts team, The Kickin' Chickens. Piggy practices her performance for Miss Nanny too hard and loses her voice!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Campy Camper Day!/ Founder's Day Flounder!
programme.desc: While on a camping trip, Mickey, Donald and Daisy can't unplug from their electronic devices. Mickey and the gang celebrate the 100th birthday of Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Vampirina: The Vamp-Opera/ This Haunted House is Closed
programme.desc: Vee writes a song made of a spell that gets the whole town singing! Before the Hauntley's can restore the B&B to it's spooky state, an inspector pops up to check it's spookiness.

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Hypnotic Hughesville/The Piggy Bank Caper
programme.desc: When the Great Orsino hypnotizes everyone in Hughesville, the Rocketeer must find a way to wake them! Sylvester Slapdash steals Kit's piggy bank in search of a special coin!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Where's Mickey? / Cuckoo in Hot Dog Hills!
programme.desc: Mickey helps Mayor McBeagle install a Flammer Jammer into his car. Cuckoo Loca's cousins visit from Paris.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Road Rally
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals embark on the first annual Clubhouse road rally. The friends select their favourite mode of transportation, with Goofy getting to ride in Professor Von Drake's latest invention. The race leads them across deserts, mountains and more.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mousekedoer Adventure
programme.desc: When the Mousekedoer malfunctions, Professor Von Drake sends Mickey and friends inside the machine to fix it.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Take Your Dog to Work Day / Slumber Paw-ty
programme.desc: The pups lose an important part of Bob's presentation during Take Your Dog to Work Day. Bob, the pugs and Keia run out of popcorn at their first slumber party.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: International superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers. Join Ralph, Leo, Donnie and Mikey as they master new weapons, battle absurd mutants and discover a hidden city beneath New York.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Farm Pit/ Crock Talk
programme.desc: Dad decides to convert the Turner home into a farm. Unfortunately, it takes Cosmo and Wanda's magic to give Dad a green thumb and when they're swept away by a tornado, it's up to Timmy to save the farm and his fairies!

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Oddlympics
programme.desc: Timmy and friends compete in an Olympics of their own to see who is most magical.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Knights/ Snake Charmer
programme.desc: Theodore hopes to be a knight and comically struggles to do good deeds. Alvin and Simon create a fake snake to help Dave get over his fear of snakes.

programme.title: Movie: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Flint Lockwood must leave his new job to take care of food-animal hybrids that are being created by his old invention.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Life in a Day/ Sun Bleached
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to live a life of extreme danger. SpongeBob and Patrick become obsessed with tanning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patty Caper/ Plankton's Regular
programme.desc: The secret ingredient in the Krabby Patty is stolen; the Chum Bucket gets a new customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Hat for Pat/ Toy Store of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs offers Patrick a job as a sign-holder. SpongeBob and Patrick spend the night locked in a toy store.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid's Visit/ To Squarepants or Not to Squarepants
programme.desc: SpongeBob decorates his home like Squidward's so that his neighbour will visit. All of SpongeBob's square pants have shrunk in the dryer, and he can't find any square pants anywhere.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature creates chaos in the underwater city Bikini Bottom, where he lives.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Growth Spout/ Stuck in the Wringer
programme.desc: Pearl goes through a growth spurt; after showering, SpongeBob gets stuck in his wringer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Opposite Day
programme.desc: In order to sell his home Squidward tells SpongeBob and Patrick that it's opposite day in the hopes they will act normal.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Last Stand
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick protest the construction of a highway that would destroy Jellyfish Fields.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: That Sinking Feeling/ Karate Star
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Abrasive Side / Earworm
programme.desc: SpongeBob can never say 'no'; SpongeBob has a song stuck in his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Play's the Thing/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs opens a diner. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: It's My Party/ Keeping Up with the Humphries

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: School Alone/ It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany get stuck at school with a ghost that roams the halls; Alvin gets some unwanted attention when he claims to have found a meteor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Big Bro Theodore/ No Putts, No Glory
programme.desc: When Theodore mistakenly thinks he's the oldest brother, he tries to be a better role model for Alvin and Simon.Alvin tricks Theodore into believing he's great at mini golf which backfires when Theo signs up for a tournament.

programme.title: Movie: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Flint Lockwood must leave his new job to take care of food-animal hybrids that are being created by his old invention.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Albrittina/ Simon for President
programme.desc: When Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate, he decides to do the same and prove just how silly the test really is. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lights Camera Uh-Oh/ Wax Dave
programme.desc: The Chipmunks have 48 hours to help Jeanette make a student film. But every chipmunk has a very different movie in mind. The Chipmunks follow Dave and find out he's fallen in love with a dangerous woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Whisperer/ Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Alvin dresses Theodore up like a baby in order to impress the girl of his dreams. While attempting to make a special present for Dave, Alvin creates a snowball effect of chaos.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Slam the Door/ JAILBREAK!
programme.desc: Harl attempts to prevent Tippy from bringing the fabled 'Mars Door' back to Earth. Tippy Dorman, faces the trial of the century after his attempt to take over the world.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Poppy Starr/ The Spooky One
programme.desc: Teenage superstar, Poppy Starr, visits her grandfather, Sargent Sam Grizzled. Then, Billy and Madison lose a flying disc inside a creepy-looking house.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar
programme.desc: While stranded in the jungle during a massive storm, Claire and Simon unknowingly stumble upon a clue to the whereabouts of the treasure sought by Sinjin.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Beddy Bye/ The Grass Is Always Greener
programme.desc: Timmy always falls asleep at 9 p.m., so he wishes for a world without sleep, much to the chagrin of the human race and the Sandman. Timmy runs away to become a carnie.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Boss of Me/ He Poofs, He Scores
programme.desc: Dad takes Timmy to his office on Bring Your Kids to Work Day. Also, Timmy is talented at soccer.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.desc: The Turtles have a hard time watching their idol skateboard while stopping a burglary. Hypno-Potamus returns and causes havoc at April's homecoming dance.

programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!
programme.desc: Dewey's natural golf abilities challenge Scrooge's ego while a seemingly innocent, mystical golf course leads the group into trouble.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Time to go Turbo!

programme.desc: The match between Aiger and Fubuki continues. Aiger finds out his little sister, Naru, is transferring to Beigoma Academy too. Ranjiro Kiyama, the Wild Bey Gang Captain, decides to battle Aiger for himself.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Land it! Z Breaker!

programme.title: The American Game: Television
programme.desc: There was once a concern that airing college football games on television would hurt the sport's popularity. All these years later, it's a multi-billion-dollar business and the story of college football on television is its own saga.

programme.title: The American Game: Recruiting
programme.desc: Everything starts with the quality of the players that a school is able to recruit. Since college football's earliest days, recruiting has been one of the most critical and controversial aspects of the sport.

programme.title: College GameDay
programme.desc: All the angles in college football with previews, exclusive interviews, analysis, discussion of issues, features and predictions.

programme.title: The Greatest: College-to-Pro Coaches
programme.desc: The best coaches can lift their programs to great heights, but not every great college coach can also succeed in the pros. These are the top 11 of all time who've succeeded in both the college and pro ranks.

programme.title: The Greatest: What-Ifs?
programme.desc: Part of the fun is wondering what might have happened if a call went one way instead of another, or a key figure made a different decision or the rules were just a little different. These are the top 11 hypotheticals of all time.

programme.title: The Greatest: Upsets
programme.desc: College football has always been a game of Davids and Goliaths. Some of the most indelible results have been the ones that were least expected. These are the top 11 upsets, and the stories behind them.

programme.title: The Greatest: Rivalry Games
programme.desc: Every season, college football rivals face off, and the intensity and passion are at a fever pitch. Some clashes have resulted in unforgettable games. These are the top 11 of those quintessential, classic gridiron battles.

programme.title: Movie: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Country music superstar Jackson Maine thinks that he's found the solution to his drinking problem when he finds happiness with an up-and-coming young singer-songwriter, but when her career begins to eclipse his he falls back into his old habits.

programme.title: Movie: Just Like Heaven
programme.desc: When a workaholic doctor is seriously injured in a horrible car accident, her spirit is left lingering somewhere between Heaven and Earth in her old apartment, where a lonely architect is now living.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: Betrayal
programme.desc: Two children wander throughout exciting and dangerous parallel universes.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: The Ringer
programme.desc: In order to slide out from beneath a mound of debt, a nice young man decides to rig the Special Olympics by posing as a contestant.

programme.title: Movie: Bridge to Terabithia
programme.desc: A boy who feels he doesn't fit in befriends a girl with a gift for storytelling. Together, they create an enchanted land where they can rule as king and queen.

programme.title: Movie: Jetsons: The Movie
programme.desc: George Jetson begins a new job and discovers that someone is sabotaging his factory.

programme.title: Movie: Smallfoot

programme.title: Sesame Street: Grouch University

programme.title: Sesame Street: Game Day on Sesame Street
programme.desc: This award-winning children's series provides education and enrichment for preschoolers.

programme.title: Movie: Kin

programme.title: Finding the Way Home
programme.desc: This documentary shows the work of author J.K. Rowling's charitable Lumos Foundation, and its work to help children in orphanages and foster parent families.

programme.title: Movie: Red Eye

programme.title: Movie: Sucker Punch

programme.title: Succession: Tern Haven

programme.title: Succession: Argestes

programme.title: Succession: Return

programme.title: Succession: Dundee
programme.desc: Shiv seeks backup in her battle against Rhea as the family gathers in Logan's hometown in Scotland to celebrate his 50 years of business.

programme.title: Succession: DC
programme.desc: The Roys head to Washington for a congressional hearing about the explosive whistleblower complaint while they scramble to find new ways of securing control of the company.

programme.title: Succession: This Is Not for Tears
programme.desc: Logan looks for a sacrificial lamb among his closest allies as the future of the company hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Movie: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between two worlds, Hellboy, a half-man, half-demon must defeat an ancient sorceress.

programme.title: Movie: Out of Sight

programme.title: His Dark Materials: Betrayal
programme.desc: Two children wander throughout exciting and dangerous parallel universes.

programme.title: Becoming Mike Nichols
programme.desc: This special paints an intimate portrait of the director, producer and comedy icon, Mike Nichols.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days

programme.title: Well Groomed

programme.desc: With millions at risk after the explosion, Ulana Khomyuk tries to warn Legasov about a second threat.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Open Wide, O Earth
programme.desc: Lyudmilla ignores warnings about her firefighter husband’s contamination; Legasov lays out a decontamination plan, complete with human risks.

programme.title: Chernobyl: The Happiness of All Mankind

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: This Is Not Gonna End Well
programme.desc: Jake becomes Charlie's designated driver after he has his license suspended and to Charlie's chagrin, Alan makes plans to attend Chelsea's birthday party.

programme.title: Black-ish: Richard Youngsta
programme.desc: Dre is excited about doing a campaign with a popular rap star but becomes conflicted when Bow and Ruby provide feedback suggesting it plays on stereotypes. Meanwhile, Bow is determined to get the family to stop eating so much take-out food.

programme.title: Black-ish: Twindependence
programme.desc: Jack and Diane are tired of being twins, and after much pleading, Dre and Bow give in to letting them explore their lives as individuals. Meanwhile, Dre buys Zoey her first car, and she is over the moon.

programme.title: America Salutes You: Guitar Legends III
programme.desc: A concert to benefit brain and mental wellness charities for veterans and first responders. Featuring legendary guitarists such as Billy Gibbons, Warren Haynes, Nancy Wilson, Steve Lukather and more.

programme.title: Popstar's Best of 2019
programme.desc: Elizabeth Stanton counts down the greatest and most memorable moments and trends of 2019.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Embryos
programme.desc: Phoebe tries to beat the odds to get pregnant so she can become a surrogate mother.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Kramer urges George to seek a Holistic healer when he thinks he is having a heart attack.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Peg O'My Heart Attack
programme.desc: Mike blames Molly for Peggy's heart attack following a heated argument and now Molly wants to make amends.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Girls and a Guy Named Bud
programme.desc: When Jake learns that Alan is dating Eldridge's mom, he packs his things to stay with Judith and Herb.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Dirty Dancing Dance
programme.desc: Beverly helps Erica plan a 'Dirty Dancing' themed dance at school, only to turn on Erica when she realizes it may be inappropriate. Meanwhile, Murray tries to learn dancing with Adam with little luck.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Kara-te Kid
programme.desc: Inspired by the 'Karate Kid' films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg face off in a karate match to settle once and for all a long-running feud. Barry and Adam go to Uncle Marvin for training, but the only thing they learn is how to clean an apartment.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Childhood Not Included
programme.desc: When Caroline accidentally loses Han's expensive fish while cleaning the tank, Max considers selling a sentimental gift she just received from her mother in order to pay for a new one.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: No Money Mo Problems
programme.desc: When Derwin rehires Irv it sets off Melanie searching for her role in life and Tasha searching for monies owed. Meanwhile, Malik is forced to evaluate his extravagant lifestyle.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Project Mandy
programme.desc: For a class project, Mandy has to showcase her clothing designs at a student fashion show. After the show, the Baxters are beaming with pride for Mandy's success, until she decides to quit school to sell some of her designs.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Fire and Water
programme.desc: Daniel Jackson is presumed dead following a mission on Oannes. In fact, Daniel is being held captive by an alien who is searching for his partner who lived on Earth 4,000 years ago.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Hathor
programme.desc: Archaeologists accidentally release Hathor, a Goa'uld who has taken on the persona of a powerful Egyptian goddess.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Singularity
programme.desc: The SG-1 team rescues a little girl, who is the sole survivor of a deadly disease that has wiped out everyone on a planet. Carter is shocked to discover the girl is a human time bomb, designed by the Goa'uld to destroy the Stargate.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Cor-Ai
programme.desc: When the team travels to P3X-1279, Teal'c recognizes it as one of the Goa'uld's favourite places to harvest humans. One of the inhabitants recognizes Teal'c and puts him on trial for murder.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Enigma
programme.desc: The SG-1 team rescues a group of highly advanced aliens from a collapsing world, but later risks a court-martial to prevent their technology from falling into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Solitudes
programme.desc: The Stargate malfunctions when the team evacuates a hostile planet, leaving O'Neill and Carter trapped.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Tin Man
programme.desc: An unusual scientist implants the consciousness of the SG-1 team in robots.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: There But for the Grace of God
programme.desc: Daniel Jackson is pulled into an alternate universe where he sees Earth being invaded by the Goa'uld.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Politics
programme.desc: A powerful U.S. senator vows to shut down the Stargate project, despite Jackson's warnings.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Within the Serpent's Grasp
programme.desc: Despite the team's warnings, the government prepares to shut down the Stargate project. The team defies orders to make an unauthorized trip and end up stranded on a Goa'uld ship full of Jaffa warriors.

programme.title: Movie: Santa Claus Conquers the Martians
programme.desc: When the children of Mars become listless, Martians kidnap Santa and two children from Earth.
